5_3_14.NKJV: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the region of Argob, as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maachathites, and called Bashan after his own name, Havoth Jair, to this day.)
5_3_14.KJV: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the country of Argob unto the coasts of Geshuri and Maachathi; and called them after his own name, Bashanhavothjair , unto this day.
5_3_14.ESV: Jair the Manassite took all the region of Argob, that is, Bashan, as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called the villages after his own name, Havvoth-jair, as it is to this day.)
5_3_14.NASB: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called it, [that is], Bashan, after his own name, Havvoth-jair, [as it is] to this day.)
5_3_14.NLT: Jair, a leader from the tribe of Manasseh, conquered the whole Argob region in Bashan, all the way to the border of the Geshurites and Maacathites. Jair renamed this region after himself, calling it the Towns of Jair, as it is still known today.)
5_3_14.WEB: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the region of Argob, to the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called them, even Bashan, after his own name, Havvoth Jair, to this day.)
5_3_14.CSB17: Jair, a descendant of Manasseh, took over the entire region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and Maacathites. He called Bashan by his own name, Jair’s Villages, as it is today.
5_3_14.AMP: Jair the son (descendant) of Manasseh took all the region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, that is Bashan, and called it after his own name, Havvoth (the villages of) Jair, as it is called to this day.)
5_3_14.MSG: Jair, a son of Manasseh, got the region of Argob to the borders of the Geshurites and Maacathites. He named the Bashan villages after himself, Havvoth Jair (Jair's Tent-Villages). They're still called that.
5_3_14.NIV: Jair, a descendant of Manasseh, took the whole region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites; it was named after him, so that to this day Bashan is called Havvoth Jair.)
5_3_14.NRSVCE: Jair the Manassite acquired the whole region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and he named them — that is, Bashan — after himself, Havvoth-jair, as it is to this day.)

5_3_15.KJV: And I gave Gilead unto Machir.
5_3_15.NLT: I gave Gilead to the clan of Makir.
5_3_15.AMP: I gave Gilead to Machir [of Manasseh].
5_3_15.NIV: And I gave Gilead to Makir.

5_3_16.NKJV: And to the Reubenites and the Gadites I gave from Gilead as far as the River Arnon, the middle of the river as the border, as far as the River Jabbok, the border of the people of Ammon;
5_3_16.KJV: And unto the Reubenites and unto the Gadites I gave from Gilead even unto the river Arnon half the valley, and the border even unto the river Jabbok, which is the border of the children of Ammon;
5_3_16.ESV: and to the Reubenites and the Gadites I gave the territory from Gilead as far as the Valley of the Arnon, with the middle of the valley as a border, as far over as the river Jabbok, the border of the Ammonites;
5_3_16.NASB: 'To the Reubenites and to the Gadites I gave from Gilead even as far as the valley of Arnon, the middle of the valley as a border and as far as the river Jabbok, the border of the sons of Ammon;
5_3_16.NLT: But I also gave part of Gilead to the tribes of Reuben and Gad. The area I gave them extended from the middle of the Arnon Gorge in the south to the Jabbok River on the Ammonite frontier.
5_3_16.WEB: To the Reubenites and to the Gadites I gave from Gilead even to the valley of the Arnon, the middle of the valley, and its border, even to the river Jabbok, which is the border of the children of Ammon;
5_3_16.CSB17: and I gave to the Reubenites and Gadites the area extending from Gilead to the Arnon Valley (the middle of the valley was the border) and up to the Jabbok River, the border of the Ammonites.
5_3_16.AMP: To the Reubenites and Gadites I gave the territory from Gilead as far as the Valley of Arnon, with the middle of the Valley as a boundary, and as far as the Jabbok River, the boundary of the sons of Ammon;
5_3_16.MSG: I gave the Reubenites and Gadites the land from Gilead down to the Brook Arnon, whose middle was the boundary, and as far as the Jabbok River, the boundary line of the People of Ammon.
5_3_16.NIV: But to the Reubenites and the Gadites I gave the territory extending from Gilead down to the Arnon Gorge (the middle of the gorge being the border) and out to the Jabbok River, which is the border of the Ammonites.
5_3_16.NRSVCE: And to the Reubenites and the Gadites I gave the territory from Gilead as far as the Wadi Arnon, with the middle of the wadi as a boundary, and up to the Jabbok, the wadi being boundary of the Ammonites;

5_3_17.NKJV: the plain also, with the Jordan as the border, from Chinnereth as far as the east side of the Sea of the Arabah (the Salt Sea), below the slopes of Pisgah.
5_3_17.KJV: The plain also, and Jordan, and the coast thereof, from Chinnereth even unto the sea of the plain, even the salt sea, under Ashdothpisgah eastward. Ashdothpisgah; or, the springs of Pisgah, or, the hill
5_3_17.ESV: the Arabah also, with the Jordan as the border, from Chinnereth as far as the Sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, under the slopes of Pisgah on the east.
5_3_17.NASB: the Arabah also, with the Jordan as [a] border, from Chinnereth even as far as the sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, at the foot of the slopes of Pisgah on the east.
5_3_17.NLT: They also received the Jordan Valley, all the way from the Sea of Galilee down to the Dead Sea, with the Jordan River serving as the western boundary. To the east were the slopes of Pisgah.
5_3_17.WEB: the Arabah also, and the Jordan and its border, from Chinnereth even to the sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, under the slopes of Pisgah eastward.
5_3_17.CSB17: The Arabah and Jordan are also borders from Chinnereth as far as the Sea of the Arabah, the Dead Sea, under the slopes of Pisgah on the east.
5_3_17.AMP: the Arabah also, with the Jordan as its boundary, from Chinnereth (the Sea of Galilee) as far as the sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea (Dead Sea), at the foot of the slopes of Pisgah on the east.
5_3_17.MSG: The western boundary was the Jordan River in the Arabah all the way from the Kinnereth (the Sea of Galilee) to the Sea of the Arabah (the Salt Sea or Dead Sea) at the base of the slopes of Mount Pisgah on the east.
5_3_17.NIV: Its western border was the Jordan in the Arabah, from Kinnereth to the Sea of the Arabah (the Salt Sea), below the slopes of Pisgah.
5_3_17.NRSVCE: the Arabah also, with the Jordan and its banks, from Chinnereth down to the sea of the Arabah, the Dead Sea, with the lower slopes of Pisgah on the east.

5_3_18.NKJV: “Then I commanded you at that time, saying: ‘The LORD your God has given you this land to possess. All you men of valor shall cross over armed before your brethren, the children of Israel.
5_3_18.KJV: And I commanded you at that time, saying, The LORD your God hath given you this land to possess it: ye shall pass over armed before your brethren the children of Israel, all that are meet for the war. meet: Heb. sons of power
5_3_18.ESV: “And I commanded you at that time, saying, ‘The LORD your God has given you this land to possess. All your men of valor shall cross over armed before your brothers, the people of Israel.
5_3_18.NASB: 'Then I commanded you at that time, saying, 'The LORD your God has given you this land to possess it; all you valiant men shall cross over armed before your brothers, the sons of Israel.
5_3_18.NLT: “At that time I gave this command to the tribes that would live east of the Jordan: ‘Although the LORD your God has given you this land as your property, all your fighting men must cross the Jordan ahead of your Israelite relatives, armed and ready to assist them.
5_3_18.WEB: I commanded you at that time, saying, “Yahweh your God has given you this land to possess it. You shall pass over armed before your brothers the children of Israel, all the men of valor.
5_3_18.CSB17: “I commanded you at that time: The LORD your God has given you this land to possess. All your valiant men will cross over in battle formation ahead of your brothers the Israelites.
5_3_18.AMP: "Then I commanded you [Reuben, Gad, and the half-tribe of Manasseh] at that time, saying, 'The LORD your God has given you this land to possess; all you who are brave men shall cross over [the Jordan] armed before your brothers, the sons of Israel.
5_3_18.MSG: I commanded you at that time, "God, your God, has given you this land to possess. Your men, fit and armed for the fight, are to cross the river in advance of their brothers, the People of Israel.
5_3_18.NIV: I commanded you at that time: “The Lord your God has given you this land to take possession of it. But all your able-bodied men, armed for battle, must cross over ahead of your brother Israelites.
5_3_18.NRSVCE: At that time, I charged you as follows: “Although the LORD your God has given you this land to occupy, all your troops shall cross over armed as the vanguard of your Israelite kin.

5_3_19.NKJV: But your wives, your little ones, and your livestock (I know that you have much livestock) shall stay in your cities which I have given you,
5_3_19.KJV: But your wives, and your little ones, and your cattle, ( for I know that ye have much cattle,) shall abide in your cities which I have given you;
5_3_19.ESV: Only your wives, your little ones, and your livestock (I know that you have much livestock) shall remain in the cities that I have given you,
5_3_19.NASB: 'But your wives and your little ones and your livestock (I know that you have much livestock) shall remain in your cities which I have given you,
5_3_19.NLT: Your wives, children, and numerous livestock, however, may stay behind in the towns I have given you.
5_3_19.WEB: But your wives, and your little ones, and your livestock, (I know that you have much livestock), shall live in your cities which I have given you,
5_3_19.CSB17: But your wives, dependents, and livestock — I know that you have a lot of livestock — will remain in the cities I have given you
5_3_19.AMP: But your wives and your children and your cattle—I know that you have much livestock—shall remain in your cities which I have given you,
5_3_19.MSG: Only your wives, children, and livestock (I know you have much livestock) may go ahead and settle down in the towns I have already given you
5_3_19.NIV: However, your wives, your children and your livestock (I know you have much livestock) may stay in the towns I have given you,
5_3_19.NRSVCE: Only your wives, your children, and your livestock — I know that you have much livestock — shall stay behind in the towns that I have given to you.

5_3_20.NKJV: until the LORD has given rest to your brethren as to you, and they also possess the land which the LORD your God is giving them beyond the Jordan. Then each of you may return to his possession which I have given you.’
5_3_20.KJV: Until the LORD have given rest unto your brethren, as well as unto you, and until they also possess the land which the LORD your God hath given them beyond Jordan: and then shall ye return every man unto his possession, which I have given you.
5_3_20.ESV: until the LORD gives rest to your brothers, as to you, and they also occupy the land that the LORD your God gives them beyond the Jordan. Then each of you may return to his possession which I have given you.’
5_3_20.NASB: until the LORD gives rest to your fellow countrymen as to you, and they also possess the land which the LORD your God will give them beyond the Jordan. Then you may return every man to his possession which I have given you.'
5_3_20.NLT: When the LORD has given security to the rest of the Israelites, as he has to you, and when they occupy the land the LORD your God is giving them across the Jordan River, then you may all return here to the land I have given you.’
5_3_20.WEB: until Yahweh gives rest to your brothers, as to you, and they also possess the land which Yahweh your God gives them beyond the Jordan. Then you shall each return to his own possession, which I have given you.”
5_3_20.CSB17: until the LORD gives rest to your brothers as he has to you, and they also take possession of the land the LORD your God is giving them across the Jordan. Then each of you may return to his possession that I have given you.
5_3_20.AMP: until the LORD gives rest to your fellow countrymen as [He has] to you, and they also possess the land which the LORD your God has given them beyond the Jordan. Then each of you may return to the land (possession) which I have given to you.'
5_3_20.MSG: until God secures living space for your brothers as he has for you and they have taken possession of the country west of the Jordan that God, your God, is giving them. After that, each man may return to the land I've given you here."
5_3_20.NIV: until the Lord gives rest to your brothers as he has to you, and they too have taken over the land that the Lord your God is giving them, across the Jordan. After that, each of you may go back to the possession I have given you.”
5_3_20.NRSVCE: When the LORD gives rest to your kindred, as to you, and they too have occupied the land that the LORD your God is giving them beyond the Jordan, then each of you may return to the property that I have given to you.”

5_3_21.NKJV: “And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, ‘Your eyes have seen all that the LORD your God has done to these two kings; so will the LORD do to all the kingdoms through which you pass.
5_3_21.KJV: And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, Thine eyes have seen all that the LORD your God hath done unto these two kings: so shall the LORD do unto all the kingdoms whither thou passest.
5_3_21.ESV: And I commanded Joshua at that time, ‘Your eyes have seen all that the LORD your God has done to these two kings. So will the LORD do to all the kingdoms into which you are crossing.
5_3_21.NASB: 'I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, 'Your eyes have seen all that the LORD your God has done to these two kings; so the LORD shall do to all the kingdoms into which you are about to cross.
5_3_21.NLT: “At that time I gave Joshua this charge: ‘You have seen for yourself everything the LORD your God has done to these two kings. He will do the same to all the kingdoms on the west side of the Jordan.
5_3_21.WEB: I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, “Your eyes have seen all that Yahweh your God has done to these two kings. So shall Yahweh do to all the kingdoms where you go over.
5_3_21.CSB17: “I commanded Joshua at that time: Your own eyes have seen everything the LORD your God has done to these two kings. The LORD will do the same to all the kingdoms you are about to enter.
5_3_21.AMP: I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, 'Your eyes have seen everything that the LORD your God has done to these two kings [Sihon and Og]; so the LORD shall do the same to all the kingdoms into which you are about to cross.
5_3_21.MSG: I commanded Joshua at that time, "You've seen with your own two eyes everything God, your God, has done to these two kings. God is going to do the same thing to all the kingdoms over there across the river where you're headed.
5_3_21.NIV: Moses Forbidden to Cross the JordanAt that time I commanded Joshua: “You have seen with your own eyes all that the Lord your God has done to these two kings. The Lord will do the same to all the kingdoms over there where you are going.
5_3_21.NRSVCE: And I charged Joshua as well at that time, saying: “Your own eyes have seen everything that the LORD your God has done to these two kings; so the LORD will do to all the kingdoms into which you are about to cross.

5_3_22.NKJV: You must not fear them, for the LORD your God Himself fights for you.’
5_3_22.KJV: Ye shall not fear them: for the LORD your God he shall fight for you.
5_3_22.ESV: You shall not fear them, for it is the LORD your God who fights for you.’
5_3_22.NASB: 'Do not fear them, for the LORD your God is the one fighting for you.'
5_3_22.NLT: Do not be afraid of the nations there, for the LORD your God will fight for you.’
5_3_22.WEB: You shall not fear them; for Yahweh your God himself fights for you.”
5_3_22.CSB17: Don’t be afraid of them, for the LORD your God fights for you.
5_3_22.AMP: Do not fear them, for it is the LORD your God who is fighting for you.'
5_3_22.MSG: Don't be afraid of them. God, your God, —he's fighting for you."
5_3_22.NIV: Do not be afraid of them; the Lord your God himself will fight for you.”
5_3_22.NRSVCE: Do not fear them, for it is the LORD your God who fights for you.”

5_3_23.NKJV: “Then I pleaded with the LORD at that time, saying:
5_3_23.KJV: And I besought the LORD at that time, saying,
5_3_23.ESV: “And I pleaded with the LORD at that time, saying,
5_3_23.NASB: 'I also pleaded with the LORD at that time, saying,
5_3_23.NLT: “At that time I pleaded with the LORD and said,
5_3_23.WEB: I begged Yahweh at that time, saying,
5_3_23.CSB17: “At that time I begged the LORD:
5_3_23.AMP: "Then I pleaded with the LORD at that time [for His favor], saying,
5_3_23.MSG: At that same time, I begged God:
5_3_23.NIV: At that time I pleaded with the Lord:
5_3_23.NRSVCE: At that time, too, I entreated the LORD, saying:

5_3_24.NKJV: ‘O Lord GOD, You have begun to show Your servant Your greatness and Your mighty hand, for what god is there in heaven or on earth who can do anything like Your works and Your mighty deeds?
5_3_24.KJV: O Lord GOD, thou hast begun to shew thy servant thy greatness, and thy mighty hand: for what God is there in heaven or in earth, that can do according to thy works, and according to thy might?
5_3_24.ESV: ‘O Lord GOD, you have only begun to show your servant your greatness and your mighty hand. For what god is there in heaven or on earth who can do such works and mighty acts as yours?
5_3_24.NASB: 'O Lord GOD, You have begun to show Your servant Your greatness and Your strong hand; for what god is there in heaven or on earth who can do such works and mighty acts as Yours?
5_3_24.NLT: ‘O Sovereign LORD, you have only begun to show your greatness and the strength of your hand to me, your servant. Is there any god in heaven or on earth who can perform such great and mighty deeds as you do?
5_3_24.WEB: “Lord Yahweh, you have begun to show your servant your greatness, and your strong hand. For what god is there in heaven or in earth that can do works like yours, and mighty acts like yours?
5_3_24.CSB17: Lord GOD, you have begun to show your greatness and your strong hand to your servant, for what god is there in heaven or on earth who can perform deeds and mighty acts like yours?
5_3_24.AMP: 'O Lord GOD, You have only begun to show Your servant Your greatness and Your mighty hand; for what god is there in heaven or on earth that can do such works and mighty acts (miracles) as Yours?
5_3_24.MSG: "God, my Master, you let me in on the beginnings, you let me see your greatness, you let me see your might—what god in Heaven or Earth can do anything like what you've done!
5_3_24.NIV: “O Sovereign Lord, you have begun to show to your servant your greatness and your strong hand. For what god is there in heaven or on earth who can do the deeds and mighty works you do?
5_3_24.NRSVCE: “O Lord GOD, you have only begun to show your servant your greatness and your might; what god in heaven or on earth can perform deeds and mighty acts like yours!

5_3_25.NKJV: I pray, let me cross over and see the good land beyond the Jordan, those pleasant mountains, and Lebanon.’
5_3_25.KJV: I pray thee, let me go over, and see the good land that is beyond Jordan, that goodly mountain, and Lebanon.
5_3_25.ESV: Please let me go over and see the good land beyond the Jordan, that good hill country and Lebanon.’
5_3_25.NASB: 'Let me, I pray, cross over and see the fair land that is beyond the Jordan, that good hill country and Lebanon.'
5_3_25.NLT: Please let me cross the Jordan to see the wonderful land on the other side, the beautiful hill country and the Lebanon mountains.’
5_3_25.WEB: Please let me go over and see the good land that is beyond the Jordan, that fine mountain, and Lebanon.”
5_3_25.CSB17: Please let me cross over and see the beautiful land on the other side of the Jordan, that good hill country and Lebanon.
5_3_25.AMP: I pray, let me go over and see the good land that is beyond the Jordan, that good hill country [with Hermon] and Lebanon.'
5_3_25.MSG: Please, let me in also on the endings, let me cross the river and see the good land over the Jordan, the lush hills, the Lebanon mountains."
5_3_25.NIV: Let me go over and see the good land beyond the Jordan—that fine hill country and Lebanon.”
5_3_25.NRSVCE: Let me cross over to see the good land beyond the Jordan, that good hill country and the Lebanon.”

5_3_26.NKJV: “But the LORD was angry with me on your account, and would not listen to me. So the LORD said to me: ‘Enough of that! Speak no more to Me of this matter.
5_3_26.KJV: But the LORD was wroth with me for your sakes, and would not hear me: and the LORD said unto me, Let it suffice thee; speak no more unto me of this matter.
5_3_26.ESV: But the LORD was angry with me because of you and would not listen to me. And the LORD said to me, ‘Enough from you; do not speak to me of this matter again.
5_3_26.NASB: 'But the LORD was angry with me on your account, and would not listen to me; and the LORD said to me, 'Enough! Speak to Me no more of this matter.
5_3_26.NLT: “But the LORD was angry with me because of you, and he would not listen to me. ‘That’s enough!’ he declared. ‘Speak of it no more.
5_3_26.WEB: But Yahweh was angry with me for your sakes, and didn’t listen to me. Yahweh said to me, “Let this satisfy you. Speak no more to me of this matter.
5_3_26.CSB17: “But the LORD was angry with me because of you and would not listen to me. The LORD said to me, ‘That’s enough! Do not speak to me again about this matter.
5_3_26.AMP: But the LORD was angry with me because of you [and your rebellion at Meribah], and would not listen to me; and the LORD said to me, 'Enough! Speak to Me no longer about this matter.
5_3_26.MSG: But God was still angry with me because of you. He wouldn't listen. He said, "Enough of that. Not another word from you on this.
5_3_26.NIV: But because of you the Lord was angry with me and would not listen to me. “That is enough,” the Lord said. “Do not speak to me anymore about this matter.
5_3_26.NRSVCE: But the LORD was angry with me on your account and would not heed me. The LORD said to me, “Enough from you! Never speak to me of this matter again!

5_3_27.NKJV: Go up to the top of Pisgah, and lift your eyes toward the west, the north, the south, and the east; behold it with your eyes, for you shall not cross over this Jordan.
5_3_27.KJV: Get thee up into the top of Pisgah, and lift up thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold it with thine eyes: for thou shalt not go over this Jordan. Pisgah: or, the hill
5_3_27.ESV: Go up to the top of Pisgah and lift up your eyes westward and northward and southward and eastward, and look at it with your eyes, for you shall not go over this Jordan.
5_3_27.NASB: 'Go up to the top of Pisgah and lift up your eyes to the west and north and south and east, and see [it] with your eyes, for you shall not cross over this Jordan.
5_3_27.NLT: But go up to Pisgah Peak, and look over the land in every direction. Take a good look, but you may not cross the Jordan River.
5_3_27.WEB: Go up to the top of Pisgah, and lift up your eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and see with your eyes; for you shall not go over this Jordan.
5_3_27.CSB17: Go to the top of Pisgah and look to the west, north, south, and east, and see it with your own eyes, for you will not cross the Jordan.
5_3_27.AMP: Go up to the top of [Mount] Pisgah and raise your eyes toward the west and north and south and east, and see it with your eyes, for you shall not cross this Jordan.
5_3_27.MSG: Climb to the top of Mount Pisgah and look around: look west, north, south, east. Take in the land with your own eyes. Take a good look because you're not going to cross this Jordan.
5_3_27.NIV: Go up to the top of Pisgah and look west and north and south and east. Look at the land with your own eyes, since you are not going to cross this Jordan.
5_3_27.NRSVCE: Go up to the top of Pisgah and look around you to the west, to the north, to the south, and to the east. Look well, for you shall not cross over this Jordan.

5_3_28.NKJV: But command Joshua, and encourage him and strengthen him; for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which you will see.’
5_3_28.KJV: But charge Joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him: for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which thou shalt see.
5_3_28.ESV: But charge Joshua, and encourage and strengthen him, for he shall go over at the head of this people, and he shall put them in possession of the land that you shall see.’
5_3_28.NASB: 'But charge Joshua and encourage him and strengthen him, for he shall go across at the head of this people, and he will give them as an inheritance the land which you will see.'
5_3_28.NLT: Instead, commission Joshua and encourage and strengthen him, for he will lead the people across the Jordan. He will give them all the land you now see before you as their possession.’
5_3_28.WEB: But commission Joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him; for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which you shall see.”
5_3_28.CSB17: But commission Joshua and encourage and strengthen him, for he will cross over ahead of the people and enable them to inherit this land that you will see.’
5_3_28.AMP: But command Joshua and encourage and strengthen him, for he shall go across and lead this people, and he will give them the land which you see as an inheritance.'
5_3_28.MSG: "Then command Joshua: Give him courage. Give him strength. Single-handed he will lead this people across the river. Single-handed he'll cause them to inherit the land at which you can only look."
5_3_28.NIV: But commission Joshua, and encourage and strengthen him, for he will lead this people across and will cause them to inherit the land that you will see.”
5_3_28.NRSVCE: But charge Joshua, and encourage and strengthen him, because it is he who shall cross over at the head of this people and who shall secure their possession of the land that you will see.”

5_3_29.NKJV: “So we stayed in the valley opposite Beth Peor.
5_3_29.KJV: So we abode in the valley over against Bethpeor.
5_3_29.ESV: So we remained in the valley opposite Beth-peor.
5_3_29.NASB: 'So we remained in the valley opposite Beth-peor.
5_3_29.NLT: So we stayed in the valley near Beth-peor.
5_3_29.WEB: So we stayed in the valley near Beth Peor.
5_3_29.CSB17: So we stayed in the valley facing Beth-peor.
5_3_29.AMP: So we stayed in the Valley opposite Beth-peor.
5_3_29.MSG: That's why we have stayed in this valley near Beth Peor.
5_3_29.NIV: So we stayed in the valley near Beth Peor.
5_3_29.NRSVCE: So we remained in the valley opposite Beth-peor.

5_4_1.NKJV: “Now, O Israel, listen to the statutes and the judgments which I teach you to observe, that you may live, and go in and possess the land which the LORD God of your fathers is giving you.
5_4_1.KJV: Now therefore hearken, O Israel, unto the statutes and unto the judgments, which I teach you, for to do them, that ye may live, and go in and possess the land which the LORD God of your fathers giveth you.
5_4_1.ESV: “And now, O Israel, listen to the statutes and the rules that I am teaching you, and do them, that you may live, and go in and take possession of the land that the LORD, the God of your fathers, is giving you.
5_4_1.NASB: 'Now, O Israel, listen to the statutes and the judgments which I am teaching you to perform, so that you may live and go in and take possession of the land which the LORD, the God of your fathers, is giving you.
5_4_1.NLT: “And now, Israel, listen carefully to these decrees and regulations that I am about to teach you. Obey them so that you may live, so you may enter and occupy the land that the LORD, the God of your ancestors, is giving you.
5_4_1.WEB: Now, Israel, listen to the statutes and to the ordinances, which I teach you, to do them; that you may live, and go in and possess the land which Yahweh, the God of your fathers, gives you.
5_4_1.CSB17: “Now, Israel, listen to the statutes and ordinances I am teaching you to follow, so that you may live, enter, and take possession of the land the LORD, the God of your fathers, is giving you.
5_4_1.AMP: "Now, O Israel, listen and pay attention to the statutes and the judgments (God's legal decisions) which I am teaching you to do, so that you may live and go in and take possession of the land which the LORD, the God of your fathers, is giving you.
5_4_1.MSG: Now listen, Israel, listen carefully to the rules and regulations that I am teaching you to follow so that you may live and enter and take possession of the land that God, the God-of-Your-Fathers, is giving to you.
5_4_1.NIV: Obedience CommandedHear now, O Israel, the decrees and laws I am about to teach you. Follow them so that you may live and may go in and take possession of the land that the Lord, the God of your fathers, is giving you.
5_4_1.NRSVCE: So now, Israel, give heed to the statutes and ordinances that I am teaching you to observe, so that you may live to enter and occupy the land that the LORD, the God of your ancestors, is giving you.

5_4_2.NKJV: You shall not add to the word which I command you, nor take from it, that you may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I command you.
5_4_2.KJV: Ye shall not add unto the word which I command you, neither shall ye diminish ought from it, that ye may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I command you.
5_4_2.ESV: You shall not add to the word that I command you, nor take from it, that you may keep the commandments of the LORD your God that I command you.
5_4_2.NASB: 'You shall not add to the word which I am commanding you, nor take away from it, that you may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I command you.
5_4_2.NLT: Do not add to or subtract from these commands I am giving you. Just obey the commands of the LORD your God that I am giving you.
5_4_2.WEB: You shall not add to the word which I command you, neither shall you take away from it, that you may keep the commandments of Yahweh your God which I command you.
5_4_2.CSB17: You must not add anything to what I command you or take anything away from it, so that you may keep the commands of the LORD your God I am giving you.
5_4_2.AMP: You shall not add to the word which I am commanding you, nor take away from it, so that you may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I am commanding you.
5_4_2.MSG: Don't add a word to what I command you, and don't remove a word from it. Keep the commands of God, your God, that I am commanding you.
5_4_2.NIV: Do not add to what I command you and do not subtract from it, but keep the commands of the Lord your God that I give you.
5_4_2.NRSVCE: You must neither add anything to what I command you nor take away anything from it, but keep the commandments of the LORD your God with which I am charging you.

5_4_3.NKJV: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did at Baal Peor; for the LORD your God has destroyed from among you all the men who followed Baal of Peor.
5_4_3.KJV: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did because of Baalpeor: for all the men that followed Baalpeor, the LORD thy God hath destroyed them from among you.
5_4_3.ESV: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did at Baal-peor, for the LORD your God destroyed from among you all the men who followed the Baal of Peor.
5_4_3.NASB: 'Your eyes have seen what the LORD has done in the case of Baal-peor, for all the men who followed Baal-peor, the LORD your God has destroyed them from among you.
5_4_3.NLT: “You saw for yourself what the LORD did to you at Baal-peor. There the LORD your God destroyed everyone who had worshiped Baal, the god of Peor.
5_4_3.WEB: Your eyes have seen what Yahweh did because of Baal Peor; for all the men who followed Baal Peor, Yahweh your God has destroyed them from among you.
5_4_3.CSB17: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did at Baal-peor, for the LORD your God destroyed every one of you who followed Baal of Peor.
5_4_3.AMP: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did at Baal-peor; for all the men who followed [and participated in the worship of] Baal of Peor, the LORD your God destroyed them from among you,
5_4_3.MSG: You saw with your own eyes what God did at Baal Peor, how God destroyed from among you every man who joined in the Baal Peor orgies.
5_4_3.NIV: You saw with your own eyes what the Lord did at Baal Peor. The Lord your God destroyed from among you everyone who followed the Baal of Peor,
5_4_3.NRSVCE: You have seen for yourselves what the LORD did with regard to the Baal of Peor — how the LORD your God destroyed from among you everyone who followed the Baal of Peor,

5_4_4.NKJV: But you who held fast to the LORD your God are alive today, every one of you.
5_4_4.KJV: But ye that did cleave unto the LORD your God are alive every one of you this day.
5_4_4.ESV: But you who held fast to the LORD your God are all alive today.
5_4_4.NASB: 'But you who held fast to the LORD your God are alive today, every one of you.
5_4_4.NLT: But all of you who were faithful to the LORD your God are still alive today — every one of you.
5_4_4.WEB: But you who were faithful to Yahweh your God are all alive today.
5_4_4.CSB17: But you who have remained faithful to the LORD your God are all alive today.
5_4_4.AMP: but you who held tightly to the LORD your God are alive today, every one of you.
5_4_4.MSG: But you, the ones who held tight to God, your God, are alive and well, every one of you, today.
5_4_4.NIV: but all of you who held fast to the Lord your God are still alive today.
5_4_4.NRSVCE: while those of you who held fast to the LORD your God are all alive today.

5_4_5.NKJV: “Surely I have taught you statutes and judgments, just as the LORD my God commanded me, that you should act according to them in the land which you go to possess.
5_4_5.KJV: Behold, I have taught you statutes and judgments, even as the LORD my God commanded me, that ye should do so in the land whither ye go to possess it.
5_4_5.ESV: See, I have taught you statutes and rules, as the LORD my God commanded me, that you should do them in the land that you are entering to take possession of it.
5_4_5.NASB: 'See, I have taught you statutes and judgments just as the LORD my God commanded me, that you should do thus in the land where you are entering to possess it.
5_4_5.NLT: “Look, I now teach you these decrees and regulations just as the LORD my God commanded me, so that you may obey them in the land you are about to enter and occupy.
5_4_5.WEB: Behold, I have taught you statutes and ordinances, even as Yahweh my God commanded me, that you should do so in the middle of the land where you go in to possess it.
5_4_5.CSB17: Look, I have taught you statutes and ordinances as the LORD my God has commanded me, so that you may follow them in the land you are entering to possess.
5_4_5.AMP: "Look, I have taught you statutes and judgments just as the LORD my God has commanded me, so that you may do them in the land which you are entering to possess.
5_4_5.MSG: Pay attention: I'm teaching you the rules and regulations that God commanded me, so that you may live by them in the land you are entering to take up ownership.
5_4_5.NIV: See, I have taught you decrees and laws as the Lord my God commanded me, so that you may follow them in the land you are entering to take possession of it.
5_4_5.NRSVCE: See, just as the LORD my God has charged me, I now teach you statutes and ordinances for you to observe in the land that you are about to enter and occupy.

5_4_6.NKJV: Therefore be careful to observe them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples who will hear all these statutes, and say, ‘Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.’
5_4_6.KJV: Keep therefore and do them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the nations, which shall hear all these statutes, and say, Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.
5_4_6.ESV: Keep them and do them, for that will be your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples, who, when they hear all these statutes, will say, ‘Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.’
5_4_6.NASB: 'So keep and do [them], for that is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples who will hear all these statutes and say, 'Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.'
5_4_6.NLT: Obey them completely, and you will display your wisdom and intelligence among the surrounding nations. When they hear all these decrees, they will exclaim, ‘How wise and prudent are the people of this great nation!’
5_4_6.WEB: Keep therefore and do them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples, who shall hear all these statutes, and say, “Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.”
5_4_6.CSB17: Carefully follow them, for this will show your wisdom and understanding in the eyes of the peoples. When they hear about all these statutes, they will say, ‘This great nation is indeed a wise and understanding people.’
5_4_6.AMP: So keep and do them, for that is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the peoples who will hear all these statutes and say, 'Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.'
5_4_6.MSG: Keep them. Practice them. You'll become wise and understanding. When people hear and see what's going on, they'll say, "What a great nation! So wise, so understanding! We've never seen anything like it."
5_4_6.NIV: Observe them carefully, for this will show your wisdom and understanding to the nations, who will hear about all these decrees and say, “Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people.”
5_4_6.NRSVCE: You must observe them diligently, for this will show your wisdom and discernment to the peoples, who, when they hear all these statutes, will say, “Surely this great nation is a wise and discerning people!”

5_4_7.NKJV: “For what great nation is there that has God so near to it, as the LORD our God is to us, for whatever reason we may call upon Him?
5_4_7.KJV: For what nation is there so great, who hath God so nigh unto them, as the LORD our God is in all things that we call upon him for?
5_4_7.ESV: For what great nation is there that has a god so near to it as the LORD our God is to us, whenever we call upon him?
5_4_7.NASB: 'For what great nation is there that has a god so near to it as is the LORD our God whenever we call on Him?
5_4_7.NLT: For what great nation has a god as near to them as the LORD our God is near to us whenever we call on him?
5_4_7.WEB: For what great nation is there, that has a god so near to them, as Yahweh our God is whenever we call on him?
5_4_7.CSB17: For what great nation is there that has a god near to it as the LORD our God is to us whenever we call to him?
5_4_7.AMP: For what great nation is there that has a god so near to it as the LORD our God [is to us] whenever we call on Him?
5_4_7.MSG: Yes. What other great nation has gods that are intimate with them the way God, our God, is with us, always ready to listen to us?
5_4_7.NIV: What other nation is so great as to have their gods near them the way the Lord our God is near us whenever we pray to him?
5_4_7.NRSVCE: For what other great nation has a god so near to it as the LORD our God is whenever we call to him?

5_4_8.NKJV: And what great nation is there that has such statutes and righteous judgments as are in all this law which I set before you this day?
5_4_8.KJV: And what nation is there so great, that hath statutes and judgments so righteous as all this law, which I set before you this day?
5_4_8.ESV: And what great nation is there, that has statutes and rules so righteous as all this law that I set before you today?
5_4_8.NASB: 'Or what great nation is there that has statutes and judgments as righteous as this whole law which I am setting before you today?
5_4_8.NLT: And what great nation has decrees and regulations as righteous and fair as this body of instructions that I am giving you today?
5_4_8.WEB: What great nation is there, that has statutes and ordinances so righteous as all this law, which I set before you today?
5_4_8.CSB17: And what great nation has righteous statutes and ordinances like this entire law I set before you today?
5_4_8.AMP: Or what great nation has statutes and judgments so righteous (upright, just) as this whole law which I am placing before you today?
5_4_8.MSG: And what other great nation has rules and regulations as good and fair as this Revelation that I'm setting before you today?
5_4_8.NIV: And what other nation is so great as to have such righteous decrees and laws as this body of laws I am setting before you today?
5_4_8.NRSVCE: And what other great nation has statutes and ordinances as just as this entire law that I am setting before you today?

5_4_9.NKJV: Only take heed to yourself, and diligently keep yourself, lest you forget the things your eyes have seen, and lest they depart from your heart all the days of your life. And teach them to your children and your grandchildren,
5_4_9.KJV: Only take heed to thyself, and keep thy soul diligently, lest thou forget the things which thine eyes have seen, and lest they depart from thy heart all the days of thy life: but teach them thy sons, and thy sons' sons;
5_4_9.ESV: “Only take care, and keep your soul diligently, lest you forget the things that your eyes have seen, and lest they depart from your heart all the days of your life. Make them known to your children and your children's children —
5_4_9.NASB: 'Only give heed to yourself and keep your soul diligently, so that you do not forget the things which your eyes have seen and they do not depart from your heart all the days of your life; but make them known to your sons and your grandsons.
5_4_9.NLT: “But watch out! Be careful never to forget what you yourself have seen. Do not let these memories escape from your mind as long as you live! And be sure to pass them on to your children and grandchildren.
5_4_9.WEB: Only be careful, and keep your soul diligently, lest you forget the things which your eyes saw, and lest they depart from your heart all the days of your life; but make them known to your children and your children’s children;
5_4_9.CSB17: “Only be on your guard and diligently watch yourselves, so that you don’t forget the things your eyes have seen and so that they don’t slip from your mind as long as you live. Teach them to your children and your grandchildren.
5_4_9.AMP: "Only pay attention and watch yourselves closely so that you do not forget the things which your eyes have seen and they do not depart from your heart all the days of your life. Make them known to your children and your grandchildren [impressing these things on their mind and penetrating their heart with these truths]—
5_4_9.MSG: Just make sure you stay alert. Keep close watch over yourselves. Don't forget anything of what you've seen. Don't let your heart wander off. Stay vigilant as long as you live. Teach what you've seen and heard to your children and grandchildren.
5_4_9.NIV: Only be careful, and watch yourselves closely so that you do not forget the things your eyes have seen or let them slip from your heart as long as you live. Teach them to your children and to their children after them.
5_4_9.NRSVCE: But take care and watch yourselves closely, so as neither to forget the things that your eyes have seen nor to let them slip from your mind all the days of your life; make them known to your children and your children’s children —

5_4_10.NKJV: especially concerning the day you stood before the LORD your God in Horeb, when the LORD said to me, ‘Gather the people to Me, and I will let them hear My words, that they may learn to fear Me all the days they live on the earth, and that they may teach their children.’
5_4_10.KJV: Specially the day that thou stoodest before the LORD thy God in Horeb, when the LORD said unto me, Gather me the people together, and I will make them hear my words, that they may learn to fear me all the days that they shall live upon the earth, and that they may teach their children.
5_4_10.ESV: how on the day that you stood before the LORD your God at Horeb, the LORD said to me, ‘Gather the people to me, that I may let them hear my words, so that they may learn to fear me all the days that they live on the earth, and that they may teach their children so.’
5_4_10.NASB: '[Remember] the day you stood before the LORD your God at Horeb, when the LORD said to me, 'Assemble the people to Me, that I may let them hear My words so they may learn to fear Me all the days they live on the earth, and that they may teach their children.'
5_4_10.NLT: Never forget the day when you stood before the LORD your God at Mount Sinai, where he told me, ‘Summon the people before me, and I will personally instruct them. Then they will learn to fear me as long as they live, and they will teach their children to fear me also.’
5_4_10.WEB: the day that you stood before Yahweh your God in Horeb, when Yahweh said to me, “Assemble the people to me, and I will make them hear my words, that they may learn to fear me all the days that they live on the earth, and that they may teach their children.”
5_4_10.CSB17: The day you stood before the LORD your God at Horeb, the LORD said to me, ‘Assemble the people before me, and I will let them hear my words, so that they may learn to fear me all the days they live on the earth and may instruct their children.’
5_4_10.AMP: especially the day you stood before the LORD your God at Horeb (Mount Sinai), when the LORD said to me, 'Assemble the people to Me and I will let them hear My words, so that they may learn to fear Me [with awe-filled reverence and profound respect] all the days they live on the land, and so that they may teach their children.'
5_4_10.MSG: That day when you stood before God, your God, at Horeb, God said to me, "Assemble the people in my presence to listen to my words so that they will learn to fear me in holy fear for as long as they live on the land, and then they will teach these same words to their children."
5_4_10.NIV: Remember the day you stood before the Lord your God at Horeb, when he said to me, “Assemble the people before me to hear my words so that they may learn to revere me as long as they live in the land and may teach them to their children.”
5_4_10.NRSVCE: how you once stood before the LORD your God at Horeb, when the LORD said to me, “Assemble the people for me, and I will let them hear my words, so that they may learn to fear me as long as they live on the earth, and may teach their children so”;

5_4_11.NKJV: “Then you came near and stood at the foot of the mountain, and the mountain burned with fire to the midst of heaven, with darkness, cloud, and thick darkness.
5_4_11.KJV: And ye came near and stood under the mountain; and the mountain burned with fire unto the midst of heaven, with darkness, clouds, and thick darkness. midst: Heb. heart
5_4_11.ESV: And you came near and stood at the foot of the mountain, while the mountain burned with fire to the heart of heaven, wrapped in darkness, cloud, and gloom.
5_4_11.NASB: 'You came near and stood at the foot of the mountain, and the mountain burned with fire to the [very] heart of the heavens: darkness, cloud and thick gloom.
5_4_11.NLT: “You came near and stood at the foot of the mountain, while flames from the mountain shot into the sky. The mountain was shrouded in black clouds and deep darkness.
5_4_11.WEB: You came near and stood under the mountain. The mountain burned with fire to the heart of the sky, with darkness, cloud, and thick darkness.
5_4_11.CSB17: You came near and stood at the base of the mountain, a mountain blazing with fire into the heavens and enveloped in a totally black cloud.
5_4_11.AMP: You approached and stood at the foot of the mountain, and the mountain burned with fire to the [very] heart of the heavens: darkness, cloud and thick gloom.
5_4_11.MSG: You gathered. You stood in the shadow of the mountain. The mountain was ablaze with fire, blazing high into the very heart of Heaven. You stood in deep darkness and thick clouds.
5_4_11.NIV: You came near and stood at the foot of the mountain while it blazed with fire to the very heavens, with black clouds and deep darkness.
5_4_11.NRSVCE: you approached and stood at the foot of the mountain while the mountain was blazing up to the very heavens, shrouded in dark clouds.

5_4_12.NKJV: And the LORD spoke to you out of the midst of the fire. You heard the sound of the words, but saw no form; you only heard a voice.
5_4_12.KJV: And the LORD spake unto you out of the midst of the fire: ye heard the voice of the words, but saw no similitude; only ye heard a voice. only: Heb. save a voice
5_4_12.ESV: Then the LORD spoke to you out of the midst of the fire. You heard the sound of words, but saw no form; there was only a voice.
5_4_12.NASB: 'Then the LORD spoke to you from the midst of the fire; you heard the sound of words, but you saw no form-- only a voice.
5_4_12.NLT: And the LORD spoke to you from the heart of the fire. You heard the sound of his words but didn’t see his form; there was only a voice.
5_4_12.WEB: Yahweh spoke to you out of the middle of the fire: you heard the voice of words, but you saw no form; you only heard a voice.
5_4_12.CSB17: Then the LORD spoke to you from the fire. You kept hearing the sound of the words, but didn’t see a form; there was only a voice.
5_4_12.AMP: Then the LORD spoke to you from the midst of the fire; you heard the sound of the words, but you saw no form—there was only a voice.
5_4_12.MSG: God spoke to you out of the fire. You heard the sound of words but you saw nothing—no form, only a voice.
5_4_12.NIV: Then the Lord spoke to you out of the fire. You heard the sound of words but saw no form; there was only a voice.
5_4_12.NRSVCE: Then the LORD spoke to you out of the fire. You heard the sound of words but saw no form; there was only a voice.

5_4_13.NKJV: So He declared to you His covenant which He commanded you to perform, the Ten Commandments; and He wrote them on two tablets of stone.
5_4_13.KJV: And he declared unto you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, even ten commandments; and he wrote them upon two tables of stone.
5_4_13.ESV: And he declared to you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, that is, the Ten Commandments, and he wrote them on two tablets of stone.
5_4_13.NASB: 'So He declared to you His covenant which He commanded you to perform, [that is], the Ten Commandments; and He wrote them on two tablets of stone.
5_4_13.NLT: He proclaimed his covenant — the Ten Commandments — which he commanded you to keep, and which he wrote on two stone tablets.
5_4_13.WEB: He declared to you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, even the ten commandments. He wrote them on two stone tablets.
5_4_13.CSB17: He declared his covenant to you. He commanded you to follow the Ten Commandments, which he wrote on two stone tablets.
5_4_13.AMP: So He declared to you His covenant which He commanded you to follow, the Ten Commandments; and He wrote them on two tablets of stone.
5_4_13.MSG: He announced his covenant, the Ten Words, by which he commanded you to live. Then he wrote them down on two slabs of stone.
5_4_13.NIV: He declared to you his covenant, the Ten Commandments, which he commanded you to follow and then wrote them on two stone tablets.
5_4_13.NRSVCE: He declared to you his covenant, which he charged you to observe, that is, the ten commandments; and he wrote them on two stone tablets.

5_4_14.NKJV: And the LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and judgments, that you might observe them in the land which you cross over to possess.
5_4_14.KJV: And the LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and judgments, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it.
5_4_14.ESV: And the LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and rules, that you might do them in the land that you are going over to possess.
5_4_14.NASB: 'The LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and judgments, that you might perform them in the land where you are going over to possess it.
5_4_14.NLT: It was at that time that the LORD commanded me to teach you his decrees and regulations so you would obey them in the land you are about to enter and occupy.
5_4_14.WEB: Yahweh commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and ordinances, that you might do them in the land where you go over to possess it.
5_4_14.CSB17: At that time the LORD commanded me to teach you statutes and ordinances for you to follow in the land you are about to cross into and possess.
5_4_14.AMP: The LORD commanded me at that time to teach you the statutes and judgments, so that you might do them in the land which you are going over to possess.
5_4_14.MSG: And God commanded me at that time to teach you the rules and regulations that you are to live by in the land which you are crossing over the Jordan to possess.
5_4_14.NIV: And the Lord directed me at that time to teach you the decrees and laws you are to follow in the land that you are crossing the Jordan to possess.
5_4_14.NRSVCE: And the LORD charged me at that time to teach you statutes and ordinances for you to observe in the land that you are about to cross into and occupy.

5_4_15.ESV: “Therefore watch yourselves very carefully. Since you saw no form on the day that the LORD spoke to you at Horeb out of the midst of the fire,
5_4_15.NASB: 'So watch yourselves carefully, since you did not see any form on the day the LORD spoke to you at Horeb from the midst of the fire,
5_4_15.NLT: “But be very careful! You did not see the LORD’s form on the day he spoke to you from the heart of the fire at Mount Sinai.

5_4_15.CSB17: “Diligently watch yourselves — because you did not see any form on the day the LORD spoke to you out of the fire at Horeb —
5_4_15.AMP: "So pay attention and watch yourselves carefully—for you did not see any form [of God] on the day the LORD spoke to you at Horeb from the midst of the fire—
5_4_15.MSG: You saw no form on the day God spoke to you at Horeb from out of the fire. Remember that. Carefully guard yourselves
5_4_15.NIV: Idolatry ForbiddenYou saw no form of any kind the day the Lord spoke to you at Horeb out of the fire. Therefore watch yourselves very carefully,
5_4_15.NRSVCE: Since you saw no form when the LORD spoke to you at Horeb out of the fire, take care and watch yourselves closely,
