5_5_15.CSB17: Remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt, and the LORD your God brought you out of there with a strong hand and an outstretched arm. That is why the LORD your God has commanded you to keep the Sabbath day.
5_5_15.AMP: You shall remember [with thoughtful concern] that you were a slave in the land of Egypt, and that the LORD your God brought you out of there with a mighty hand and by an outstretched arm; therefore the LORD your God has commanded you to observe the Sabbath day.
5_5_15.MSG: Don't ever forget that you were slaves in Egypt and God, your God, got you out of there in a powerful show of strength. That's why God, your God, commands you to observe the day of Sabbath rest.
5_5_15.NIV: Remember that you were slaves in Egypt and that the Lord your God brought you out of there with a mighty hand and an outstretched arm. Therefore the Lord your God has commanded you to observe the Sabbath day.
5_5_15.NRSVCE: Remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt, and the LORD your God brought you out from there with a mighty hand and an outstretched arm; therefore the LORD your God commanded you to keep the sabbath day.

5_5_16.NKJV: ‘Honor your father and your mother, as the LORD your God has commanded you, that your days may be long, and that it may be well with you in the land which the LORD your God is giving you.
5_5_16.KJV: Honour thy father and thy mother, as the LORD thy God hath commanded thee; that thy days may be prolonged, and that it may go well with thee, in the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.
5_5_16.ESV: “‘Honor your father and your mother, as the LORD your God commanded you, that your days may be long, and that it may go well with you in the land that the LORD your God is giving you.
5_5_16.NASB: 'Honor your father and your mother, as the LORD your God has commanded you, that your days may be prolonged and that it may go well with you on the land which the LORD your God gives you.
5_5_16.NLT: “Honor your father and mother, as the LORD your God commanded you. Then you will live a long, full life in the land the LORD your God is giving you.
5_5_16.WEB: “Honor your father and your mother, as Yahweh your God commanded you; that your days may be long, and that it may go well with you, in the land which Yahweh your God gives you.
5_5_16.CSB17: Honor your father and your mother, as the LORD your God has commanded you, so that you may live long and so that you may prosper in the land the LORD your God is giving you.
5_5_16.AMP: 'Honor (respect, obey, care for) your father and your mother, as the LORD your God has commanded you, so that your days [on the earth] may be prolonged and so that it may go well with you in the land which the LORD your God gives you.
5_5_16.MSG: Respect your father and mother—God, your God, commands it! You'll have a long life; the land that God is giving you will treat you well.
5_5_16.NIV: “Honor your father and your mother, as the Lord your God has commanded you, so that you may live long and that it may go well with you in the land the Lord your God is giving you.
5_5_16.NRSVCE: Honor your father and your mother, as the LORD your God commanded you, so that your days may be long and that it may go well with you in the land that the LORD your God is giving you.

5_5_20.NKJV: ‘You shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.
5_5_20.KJV: Neither shalt thou bear false witness against thy neighbour.
5_5_20.ESV: “‘And you shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.
5_5_20.NASB: 'You shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.
5_5_20.NLT: “You must not testify falsely against your neighbor.
5_5_20.WEB: “You shall not give false testimony against your neighbor.
5_5_20.CSB17: Do not give dishonest testimony against your neighbor.
5_5_20.AMP: 'You shall not give false testimony [that is, lie, withhold, or manipulate the truth] against your neighbor (any person).
5_5_20.NIV: “You shall not give false testimony against your neighbor.
5_5_20.NRSVCE: Neither shall you bear false witness against your neighbor.

5_5_21.NKJV: ‘You shall not covet your neighbor’s wife; and you shall not desire your neighbor’s house, his field, his male servant, his female servant, his ox, his donkey, or anything that is your neighbor’s.’
5_5_21.KJV: Neither shalt thou desire thy neighbour's wife, neither shalt thou covet thy neighbour's house, his field, or his manservant, or his maidservant, his ox, or his ass, or any thing that is thy neighbour's.
5_5_21.ESV: “‘And you shall not covet your neighbor's wife. And you shall not desire your neighbor's house, his field, or his male servant, or his female servant, his ox, or his donkey, or anything that is your neighbor's.’
5_5_21.NASB: 'You shall not covet your neighbor's wife, and you shall not desire your neighbor's house, his field or his male servant or his female servant, his ox or his donkey or anything that belongs to your neighbor.'
5_5_21.NLT: “You must not covet your neighbor’s wife. You must not covet your neighbor’s house or land, male or female servant, ox or donkey, or anything else that belongs to your neighbor.
5_5_21.WEB: “You shall not covet your neighbor’s wife. Neither shall you desire your neighbor’s house, his field, or his male servant, or his female servant, his ox, or his donkey, or anything that is your neighbor’s.”
5_5_21.CSB17: Do not covet your neighbor’s wife or desire your neighbor’s house, his field, his male or female slave, his ox or donkey, or anything that belongs to your neighbor.
5_5_21.AMP: 'You shall not covet [that is, desire and seek to acquire] your neighbor's wife, nor desire your neighbor's house, his field, his male servant or his female servant, his ox or his donkey or anything that belongs to your neighbor.'
5_5_21.MSG: No coveting your neighbor's wife. And no lusting for his house, field, servant, maid, ox, or donkey either—nothing that belongs to your neighbor!
5_5_21.NIV: “You shall not covet your neighbor’s wife. You shall not set your desire on your neighbor’s house or land, his manservant or maidservant, his ox or donkey, or anything that belongs to your neighbor.”
5_5_21.NRSVCE: Neither shall you covet your neighbor’s wife. Neither shall you desire your neighbor’s house, or field, or male or female slave, or ox, or donkey, or anything that belongs to your neighbor.

5_5_22.NKJV: “These words the LORD spoke to all your assembly, in the mountain from the midst of the fire, the cloud, and the thick darkness, with a loud voice; and He added no more. And He wrote them on two tablets of stone and gave them to me.
5_5_22.KJV: These words the LORD spake unto all your assembly in the mount out of the midst of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice: and he added no more. And he wrote them in two tables of stone, and delivered them unto me.
5_5_22.ESV: “These words the LORD spoke to all your assembly at the mountain out of the midst of the fire, the cloud, and the thick darkness, with a loud voice; and he added no more. And he wrote them on two tablets of stone and gave them to me.
5_5_22.NASB: 'These words the LORD spoke to all your assembly at the mountain from the midst of the fire, [of] the cloud and [of] the thick gloom, with a great voice, and He added no more. He wrote them on two tablets of stone and gave them to me.
5_5_22.NLT: “The LORD spoke these words to all of you assembled there at the foot of the mountain. He spoke with a loud voice from the heart of the fire, surrounded by clouds and deep darkness. This was all he said at that time, and he wrote his words on two stone tablets and gave them to me.
5_5_22.WEB: Yahweh spoke these words to all your assembly on the mountain out of the middle of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice. He added no more. He wrote them on two stone tablets, and gave them to me.
5_5_22.CSB17: “The LORD spoke these commands in a loud voice to your entire assembly from the fire, cloud, and total darkness on the mountain; he added nothing more. He wrote them on two stone tablets and gave them to me.
5_5_22.AMP: "The LORD spoke these words with a great voice to all your assembly at the mountain out of the midst of the fire, the cloud, and the thick darkness, and He added no more. He wrote these commandments on two tablets of stone and gave them to me.
5_5_22.MSG: These are the words that God spoke to the whole congregation at the mountain. He spoke in a tremendous voice from the fire and cloud and dark mist. And that was it. No more words. Then he wrote them on two slabs of stone and gave them to me.
5_5_22.NIV: These are the commandments the Lord proclaimed in a loud voice to your whole assembly there on the mountain from out of the fire, the cloud and the deep darkness; and he added nothing more. Then he wrote them on two stone tablets and gave them to me.
5_5_22.NRSVCE: These words the LORD spoke with a loud voice to your whole assembly at the mountain, out of the fire, the cloud, and the thick darkness, and he added no more. He wrote them on two stone tablets, and gave them to me.

5_5_23.NKJV: “So it was, when you heard the voice from the midst of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, that you came near to me, all the heads of your tribes and your elders.
5_5_23.KJV: And it came to pass, when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, (for the mountain did burn with fire,) that ye came near unto me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;
5_5_23.ESV: And as soon as you heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, you came near to me, all the heads of your tribes, and your elders.
5_5_23.NASB: 'And when you heard the voice from the midst of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, you came near to me, all the heads of your tribes and your elders.
5_5_23.NLT: “But when you heard the voice from the heart of the darkness, while the mountain was blazing with fire, all your tribal leaders and elders came to me.
5_5_23.WEB: When you heard the voice out of the middle of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, you came near to me, even all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;
5_5_23.CSB17: All of you approached me with your tribal leaders and elders when you heard the voice from the darkness and while the mountain was blazing with fire.
5_5_23.AMP: And when you heard the voice from the midst of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, you approached me, all the leaders (heads) of your tribes and your elders;
5_5_23.MSG: As it turned out, when you heard the Voice out of that dark cloud and saw the mountain on fire, you approached me, all the heads of your tribes and your leaders,
5_5_23.NIV: When you heard the voice out of the darkness, while the mountain was ablaze with fire, all the leading men of your tribes and your elders came to me.
5_5_23.NRSVCE: When you heard the voice out of the darkness, while the mountain was burning with fire, you approached me, all the heads of your tribes and your elders;

5_5_24.NKJV: And you said: ‘Surely the LORD our God has shown us His glory and His greatness, and we have heard His voice from the midst of the fire. We have seen this day that God speaks with man; yet he still lives.
5_5_24.KJV: And ye said, Behold, the LORD our God hath shewed us his glory and his greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire: we have seen this day that God doth talk with man, and he liveth.
5_5_24.ESV: And you said, ‘Behold, the LORD our God has shown us his glory and greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire. This day we have seen God speak with man, and man still live.
5_5_24.NASB: 'You said, 'Behold, the LORD our God has shown us His glory and His greatness, and we have heard His voice from the midst of the fire; we have seen today that God speaks with man, yet he lives.
5_5_24.NLT: They said, ‘Look, the LORD our God has shown us his glory and greatness, and we have heard his voice from the heart of the fire. Today we have seen that God can speak to us humans, and yet we live!
5_5_24.WEB: and you said, “Behold, Yahweh our God has shown us his glory and his greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the middle of the fire. We have seen today that God does speak with man, and he lives.
5_5_24.CSB17: You said, ‘Look, the LORD our God has shown us his glory and greatness, and we have heard his voice from the fire. Today we have seen that God speaks with a person, yet he still lives.
5_5_24.AMP: and you said, 'Behold, the LORD our God has shown us His glory and His greatness, and we have heard His voice from the midst of the fire; we have seen today that God speaks with man, yet he [still] lives.
5_5_24.MSG: and said,"Our God has revealed to us his glory and greatness. We've heard him speak from the fire today! We've seen that God can speak to humans and they can still live.
5_5_24.NIV: And you said, “The Lord our God has shown us his glory and his majesty, and we have heard his voice from the fire. Today we have seen that a man can live even if God speaks with him.
5_5_24.NRSVCE: and you said, “Look, the LORD our God has shown us his glory and greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the fire. Today we have seen that God may speak to someone and the person may still live.

5_5_25.NKJV: Now therefore, why should we die? For this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the LORD our God anymore, then we shall die.
5_5_25.KJV: Now therefore why should we die? for this great fire will consume us: if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any more, then we shall die. hear: Heb. add to hear
5_5_25.ESV: Now therefore why should we die? For this great fire will consume us. If we hear the voice of the LORD our God any more, we shall die.
5_5_25.NASB: 'Now then why should we die? For this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any longer, then we will die.
5_5_25.NLT: But now, why should we risk death again? If the LORD our God speaks to us again, we will certainly die and be consumed by this awesome fire.
5_5_25.WEB: Now therefore why should we die? For this great fire will consume us. If we hear Yahweh our God’s voice any more, then we shall die.
5_5_25.CSB17: But now, why should we die? This great fire will consume us and we will die if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any longer.
5_5_25.AMP: Now then why should we die? For this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any longer, then we will die.
5_5_25.MSG: But why risk it further? This huge fire will devour us if we stay around any longer. If we hear God's voice anymore, we'll die for sure.
5_5_25.NIV: But now, why should we die? This great fire will consume us, and we will die if we hear the voice of the Lord our God any longer.
5_5_25.NRSVCE: So now why should we die? For this great fire will consume us; if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any longer, we shall die.

5_5_26.NKJV: For who is there of all flesh who has heard the voice of the living God speaking from the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?
5_5_26.KJV: For who is there of all flesh, that hath heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?
5_5_26.ESV: For who is there of all flesh, that has heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of fire as we have, and has still lived?
5_5_26.NASB: 'For who is there of all flesh who has heard the voice of the living God speaking from the midst of the fire, as we [have], and lived?
5_5_26.NLT: Can any living thing hear the voice of the living God from the heart of the fire as we did and yet survive?
5_5_26.WEB: For who is there of all flesh, that has heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the middle of the fire, as we have, and lived?
5_5_26.CSB17: For who out of all mankind has heard the voice of the living God speaking from the fire, as we have, and lived?
5_5_26.AMP: For who is there of all flesh (mankind) who has heard the voice of the living God speaking from the midst of the fire, as we have, and lived?
5_5_26.MSG: Has anyone ever known of anyone who has heard the Voice of God the way we have and lived to tell the story?
5_5_26.NIV: For what mortal man has ever heard the voice of the living God speaking out of fire, as we have, and survived?
5_5_26.NRSVCE: For who is there of all flesh that has heard the voice of the living God speaking out of fire, as we have, and remained alive?

5_5_27.NKJV: You go near and hear all that the LORD our God may say, and tell us all that the LORD our God says to you, and we will hear and do it.’
5_5_27.KJV: Go thou near, and hear all that the LORD our God shall say: and speak thou unto us all that the LORD our God shall speak unto thee; and we will hear it, and do it.
5_5_27.ESV: Go near and hear all that the LORD our God will say, and speak to us all that the LORD our God will speak to you, and we will hear and do it.’
5_5_27.NASB: 'Go near and hear all that the LORD our God says; then speak to us all that the LORD our God speaks to you, and we will hear and do [it].'
5_5_27.NLT: Go yourself and listen to what the LORD our God says. Then come and tell us everything he tells you, and we will listen and obey.’
5_5_27.WEB: Go near, and hear all that Yahweh our God shall say, and tell us all that Yahweh our God tells you; and we will hear it, and do it.”
5_5_27.CSB17: Go near and listen to everything the LORD our God says. Then you can tell us everything the LORD our God tells you; we will listen and obey.’
5_5_27.AMP: You, Moses, go near and listen to everything that the LORD our God says; then speak to us everything that the LORD our God speaks to you, and we will listen and do it.'
5_5_27.MSG: "From now on, you go and listen to what God, our God, says and then tell us what God tells you. We'll listen and we'll do it."
5_5_27.NIV: Go near and listen to all that the Lord our God says. Then tell us whatever the Lord our God tells you. We will listen and obey.”
5_5_27.NRSVCE: Go near, you yourself, and hear all that the LORD our God will say. Then tell us everything that the LORD our God tells you, and we will listen and do it.”

5_5_28.NKJV: “Then the LORD heard the voice of your words when you spoke to me, and the LORD said to me: ‘I have heard the voice of the words of this people which they have spoken to you. They are right in all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.KJV: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, when ye spake unto me; and the LORD said unto me, I have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken unto thee: they have well said all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.ESV: “And the LORD heard your words, when you spoke to me. And the LORD said to me, ‘I have heard the words of this people, which they have spoken to you. They are right in all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.NASB: 'The LORD heard the voice of your words when you spoke to me, and the LORD said to me, 'I have heard the voice of the words of this people which they have spoken to you. They have done well in all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.NLT: “The LORD heard the request you made to me. And he said, ‘I have heard what the people said to you, and they are right.
5_5_28.WEB: Yahweh heard the voice of your words, when you spoke to me; and Yahweh said to me, “I have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken to you. They have well said all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.CSB17: “The LORD heard your words when you spoke to me. He said to me, ‘I have heard the words that these people have spoken to you. Everything they have said is right.
5_5_28.AMP: "The LORD heard your words when you spoke to me, and the LORD said to me, 'I have heard the words of this people which they have spoken to you. They have done well in all that they have spoken.
5_5_28.MSG: God heard what you said to me and told me, "I've heard what the people said to you. They're right—good and true words.
5_5_28.NIV: The Lord heard you when you spoke to me and the Lord said to me, “I have heard what this people said to you. Everything they said was good.
5_5_28.NRSVCE: The LORD heard your words when you spoke to me, and the LORD said to me: “I have heard the words of this people, which they have spoken to you; they are right in all that they have spoken.

5_5_29.NKJV: Oh, that they had such a heart in them that they would fear Me and always keep all My commandments, that it might be well with them and with their children forever!
5_5_29.KJV: O that there were such an heart in them, that they would fear me, and keep all my commandments always, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!
5_5_29.ESV: Oh that they had such a heart as this always, to fear me and to keep all my commandments, that it might go well with them and with their descendants forever!
5_5_29.NASB: 'Oh that they had such a heart in them, that they would fear Me and keep all My commandments always, that it may be well with them and with their sons forever!
5_5_29.NLT: Oh, that they would always have hearts like this, that they might fear me and obey all my commands! If they did, they and their descendants would prosper forever.
5_5_29.WEB: Oh that there were such a heart in them, that they would fear me, and keep all my commandments always, that it might be well with them, and with their children forever!
5_5_29.CSB17: If only they had such a heart to fear me and keep all my commands always, so that they and their children would prosper forever.
5_5_29.AMP: Oh that they had such a heart in them, that they would fear [and worship Me with awe-filled reverence and profound respect] and keep all My commandments always, so that it may go well with them and with their children forever!
5_5_29.MSG: What I wouldn't give if they'd always feel this way, continuing to revere me and always keep all my commands; they'd have a good life forever, they and their children!
5_5_29.NIV: Oh, that their hearts would be inclined to fear me and keep all my commands always, so that it might go well with them and their children forever!
5_5_29.NRSVCE: If only they had such a mind as this, to fear me and to keep all my commandments always, so that it might go well with them and with their children forever!

5_5_30.NKJV: Go and say to them, “Return to your tents.”
5_5_30.KJV: Go say to them, Get you into your tents again.
5_5_30.ESV: Go and say to them, “Return to your tents.”
5_5_30.NASB: 'Go, say to them, 'Return to your tents.'
5_5_30.NLT: Go and tell them, “Return to your tents.”
5_5_30.CSB17: Go and tell them: Return to your tents.
5_5_30.AMP: Go and say to them, "Return to your tents."
5_5_30.MSG: "Go ahead and tell them to go home to their tents.
5_5_30.NIV: “Go, tell them to return to their tents.
5_5_30.NRSVCE: Go say to them, ‘Return to your tents.’

5_5_31.NKJV: But as for you, stand here by Me, and I will speak to you all the commandments, the statutes, and the judgments which you shall teach them, that they may observe them in the land which I am giving them to possess.’
5_5_31.KJV: But as for thee, stand thou here by me, and I will speak unto thee all the commandments, and the statutes, and the judgments, which thou shalt teach them, that they may do them in the land which I give them to possess it.
5_5_31.ESV: But you, stand here by me, and I will tell you the whole commandment and the statutes and the rules that you shall teach them, that they may do them in the land that I am giving them to possess.’
5_5_31.NASB: 'But as for you, stand here by Me, that I may speak to you all the commandments and the statutes and the judgments which you shall teach them, that they may observe [them] in the land which I give them to possess.'
5_5_31.NLT: But you stand here with me so I can give you all my commands, decrees, and regulations. You must teach them to the people so they can obey them in the land I am giving them as their possession.’”
5_5_31.WEB: But as for you, stand here by me, and I will tell you all the commandment, and the statutes, and the ordinances, which you shall teach them, that they may do them in the land which I give them to possess it.”
5_5_31.CSB17: But you stand here with me, and I will tell you every command — the statutes and ordinances — you are to teach them, so that they may follow them in the land I am giving them to possess.’
5_5_31.AMP: But as for you, stand here by Me, and I will tell you all the commandments and the statutes and the judgments which you shall teach them, so that they may obey them in the land which I give them to possess.'
5_5_31.MSG: But you, you stay here with me so I can tell you every commandment and all the rules and regulations that you must teach them so they'll know how to live in the land that I'm giving them as their own."
5_5_31.NIV: But you stay here with me so that I may give you all the commands, decrees and laws you are to teach them to follow in the land I am giving them to possess.”
5_5_31.NRSVCE: But you, stand here by me, and I will tell you all the commandments, the statutes and the ordinances, that you shall teach them, so that they may do them in the land that I am giving them to possess.”

5_5_32.NKJV: “Therefore you shall be careful to do as the LORD your God has commanded you; you shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
5_5_32.KJV: Ye shall observe to do therefore as the LORD your God hath commanded you: ye shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
5_5_32.ESV: You shall be careful therefore to do as the LORD your God has commanded you. You shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
5_5_32.NASB: 'So you shall observe to do just as the LORD your God has commanded you; you shall not turn aside to the right or to the left.
5_5_32.NLT: So Moses told the people, “You must be careful to obey all the commands of the LORD your God, following his instructions in every detail.
5_5_32.WEB: You shall observe to do therefore as Yahweh your God has commanded you. You shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
5_5_32.CSB17: “Be careful to do as the LORD your God has commanded you; you are not to turn aside to the right or the left.
5_5_32.AMP: Therefore you shall pay attention and be careful to do just as the LORD your God has commanded you; you shall not turn aside to the right or to the left [deviating from My commandments].
5_5_32.MSG: So be very careful to act exactly as God commands you. Don't veer off to the right or the left.
5_5_32.NIV: So be careful to do what the Lord your God has commanded you; do not turn aside to the right or to the left.
5_5_32.NRSVCE: You must therefore be careful to do as the LORD your God has commanded you; you shall not turn to the right or to the left.

5_5_33.NKJV: You shall walk in all the ways which the LORD your God has commanded you, that you may live and that it may be well with you, and that you may prolong your days in the land which you shall possess.
5_5_33.KJV: Ye shall walk in all the ways which the LORD your God hath commanded you, that ye may live, and that it may be well with you, and that ye may prolong your days in the land which ye shall possess.
5_5_33.ESV: You shall walk in all the way that the LORD your God has commanded you, that you may live, and that it may go well with you, and that you may live long in the land that you shall possess.
5_5_33.NASB: 'You shall walk in all the way which the LORD your God has commanded you, that you may live and that it may be well with you, and that you may prolong [your] days in the land which you will possess.
5_5_33.NLT: Stay on the path that the LORD your God has commanded you to follow. Then you will live long and prosperous lives in the land you are about to enter and occupy.
5_5_33.WEB: You shall walk in all the way which Yahweh your God has commanded you, that you may live, and that it may be well with you, and that you may prolong your days in the land which you shall possess.
5_5_33.CSB17: Follow the whole instruction the LORD your God has commanded you, so that you may live, prosper, and have a long life in the land you will possess.
5_5_33.AMP: You shall walk [that is, live each and every day] in all the ways which the LORD your God has commanded you, so that you may live and so that it may be well with you, and that you may live long in the land which you will possess.
5_5_33.MSG: Walk straight down the road God commands so that you'll have a good life and live a long time in the land that you're about to possess.
5_5_33.NIV: Walk in all the way that the Lord your God has commanded you, so that you may live and prosper and prolong your days in the land that you will possess.
5_5_33.NRSVCE: You must follow exactly the path that the LORD your God has commanded you, so that you may live, and that it may go well with you, and that you may live long in the land that you are to possess.

5_6_1.NKJV: “Now this is the commandment, and these are the statutes and judgments which the LORD your God has commanded to teach you, that you may observe them in the land which you are crossing over to possess,
5_6_1.KJV: Now these are the commandments, the statutes, and the judgments, which the LORD your God commanded to teach you, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go to possess it: go: Heb. pass over
5_6_1.ESV: “Now this is the commandment — the statutes and the rules — that the LORD your God commanded me to teach you, that you may do them in the land to which you are going over, to possess it,
5_6_1.NASB: 'Now this is the commandment, the statutes and the judgments which the LORD your God has commanded [me] to teach you, that you might do [them] in the land where you are going over to possess it,
5_6_1.NLT: “These are the commands, decrees, and regulations that the LORD your God commanded me to teach you. You must obey them in the land you are about to enter and occupy,
5_6_1.WEB: Now this is the commandment, the statutes, and the ordinances, which Yahweh your God commanded to teach you, that you might do them in the land where you go over to possess it;
5_6_1.CSB17: “This is the command — the statutes and ordinances — the LORD your God has commanded me to teach you, so that you may follow them in the land you are about to enter and possess.
5_6_1.AMP: "Now this is the command; the statutes and the judgments (precepts) which the LORD your God has commanded me to teach you, so that you might do (follow, obey) them in the land which you are crossing over [the Jordan] to possess,
5_6_1.MSG: This is the commandment, the rules and regulations, that God, your God, commanded me to teach you to live out in the land you're about to cross into to possess.
5_6_1.NIV: Love the Lord Your GodThese are the commands, decrees and laws the Lord your God directed me to teach you to observe in the land that you are crossing the Jordan to possess,
5_6_1.NRSVCE: Now this is the commandment — the statutes and the ordinances — that the LORD your God charged me to teach you to observe in the land that you are about to cross into and occupy,

5_6_2.NKJV: that you may fear the LORD your God, to keep all His statutes and His commandments which I command you, you and your son and your grandson, all the days of your life, and that your days may be prolonged.
5_6_2.KJV: That thou mightest fear the LORD thy God, to keep all his statutes and his commandments, which I command thee, thou, and thy son, and thy son's son, all the days of thy life; and that thy days may be prolonged.
5_6_2.ESV: that you may fear the LORD your God, you and your son and your son's son, by keeping all his statutes and his commandments, which I command you, all the days of your life, and that your days may be long.
5_6_2.NASB: so that you and your son and your grandson might fear the LORD your God, to keep all His statutes and His commandments which I command you, all the days of your life, and that your days may be prolonged.
5_6_2.NLT: and you and your children and grandchildren must fear the LORD your God as long as you live. If you obey all his decrees and commands, you will enjoy a long life.
5_6_2.WEB: that you might fear Yahweh your God, to keep all his statutes and his commandments, which I command you; you, and your son, and your son’s son, all the days of your life; and that your days may be prolonged.
5_6_2.CSB17: Do this so that you may fear the LORD your God all the days of your life by keeping all his statutes and commands I am giving you, your son, and your grandson, and so that you may have a long life.
5_6_2.AMP: so that you and your son and your grandson may fear and worship the LORD your God [with awe-filled reverence and profound respect], to keep [and actively do] all His statutes and His commandments which I am commanding you, all the days of your life, so that your days may be prolonged.
5_6_2.MSG: This is so that you'll live in deep reverence before God lifelong, observing all his rules and regulations that I'm commanding you, you and your children and your grandchildren, living good long lives.
5_6_2.NIV: so that you, your children and their children after them may fear the Lord your God as long as you live by keeping all his decrees and commands that I give you, and so that you may enjoy long life.
5_6_2.NRSVCE: so that you and your children and your children’s children may fear the LORD your God all the days of your life, and keep all his decrees and his commandments that I am commanding you, so that your days may be long.

5_6_3.NKJV: Therefore hear, O Israel, and be careful to observe it, that it may be well with you, and that you may multiply greatly as the LORD God of your fathers has promised you— ‘a land flowing with milk and honey.’
5_6_3.KJV: Hear therefore, O Israel, and observe to do it; that it may be well with thee, and that ye may increase mightily, as the LORD God of thy fathers hath promised thee, in the land that floweth with milk and honey.
5_6_3.ESV: Hear therefore, O Israel, and be careful to do them, that it may go well with you, and that you may multiply greatly, as the LORD, the God of your fathers, has promised you, in a land flowing with milk and honey.
5_6_3.NASB: 'O Israel, you should listen and be careful to do [it], that it may be well with you and that you may multiply greatly, just as the LORD, the God of your fathers, has promised you, [in] a land flowing with milk and honey.
5_6_3.NLT: Listen closely, Israel, and be careful to obey. Then all will go well with you, and you will have many children in the land flowing with milk and honey, just as the LORD, the God of your ancestors, promised you.
5_6_3.WEB: Hear therefore, Israel, and observe to do it; that it may be well with you, and that you may increase mightily, as Yahweh, the God of your fathers, has promised to you, in a land flowing with milk and honey.
5_6_3.CSB17: Listen, Israel, and be careful to follow them, so that you may prosper and multiply greatly, because the LORD, the God of your fathers, has promised you a land flowing with milk and honey.
5_6_3.AMP: Therefore listen, O Israel, and be careful to do them, that it may go well with you and that you may increase greatly [in numbers], as the LORD, the God of your fathers, has promised you, in a land flowing with milk and honey.
5_6_3.MSG: Listen obediently, Israel. Do what you're told so that you'll have a good life, a life of abundance and bounty, just as God promised, in a land abounding in milk and honey.
5_6_3.NIV: Hear, O Israel, and be careful to obey so that it may go well with you and that you may increase greatly in a land flowing with milk and honey, just as the Lord, the God of your fathers, promised you.
5_6_3.NRSVCE: Hear therefore, O Israel, and observe them diligently, so that it may go well with you, and so that you may multiply greatly in a land flowing with milk and honey, as the LORD, the God of your ancestors, has promised you.

5_6_4.NKJV: “Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one!
5_6_4.KJV: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God is one LORD:
5_6_4.ESV: “Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one.
5_6_4.NASB: 'Hear, O Israel! The LORD is our God, the LORD is one!
5_6_4.NLT: “Listen, O Israel! The LORD is our God, the LORD alone.
5_6_4.WEB: Hear, Israel: Yahweh is our God. Yahweh is one.
5_6_4.CSB17: “Listen, Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one.
5_6_4.AMP: "Hear, O Israel! The LORD is our God, the LORD is one [the only God]!
5_6_4.MSG: Attention, Israel!God, our God! God the one and only!
5_6_4.NIV: Hear, O Israel: The Lord our God, the Lord is one.
5_6_4.NRSVCE: Hear, O Israel: The LORD is our God, the LORD alone.

5_6_5.NKJV: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your strength.
5_6_5.KJV: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.
5_6_5.ESV: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.
5_6_5.NASB: 'You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.
5_6_5.NLT: And you must love the LORD your God with all your heart, all your soul, and all your strength.
5_6_5.WEB: You shall love Yahweh your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your might.
5_6_5.CSB17: Love the LORD your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your strength.
5_6_5.AMP: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and mind and with all your soul and with all your strength [your entire being].
5_6_5.MSG: Love God, your God, with your whole heart: love him with all that's in you, love him with all you've got!
5_6_5.NIV: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.
5_6_5.NRSVCE: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your might.

5_6_6.NKJV: “And these words which I command you today shall be in your heart.
5_6_6.KJV: And these words, which I command thee this day, shall be in thine heart:
5_6_6.ESV: And these words that I command you today shall be on your heart.
5_6_6.NASB: 'These words, which I am commanding you today, shall be on your heart.
5_6_6.NLT: And you must commit yourselves wholeheartedly to these commands that I am giving you today.
5_6_6.WEB: These words, which I command you today, shall be on your heart;
5_6_6.CSB17: These words that I am giving you today are to be in your heart.
5_6_6.AMP: These words, which I am commanding you today, shall be [written] on your heart and mind.
5_6_6.MSG: Write these commandments that I've given you today on your hearts. Get them inside of you
5_6_6.NIV: These commandments that I give you today are to be upon your hearts.
5_6_6.NRSVCE: Keep these words that I am commanding you today in your heart.

5_6_7.NKJV: You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, when you walk by the way, when you lie down, and when you rise up.
5_6_7.KJV: And thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thine house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up. teach: Heb. whet, or, sharpen
5_6_7.ESV: You shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, and when you walk by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise.
5_6_7.NASB: You shall teach them diligently to your sons and shall talk of them when you sit in your house and when you walk by the way and when you lie down and when you rise up.
5_6_7.NLT: Repeat them again and again to your children. Talk about them when you are at home and when you are on the road, when you are going to bed and when you are getting up.
5_6_7.WEB: and you shall teach them diligently to your children, and shall talk of them when you sit in your house, and when you walk by the way, and when you lie down, and when you rise up.
5_6_7.CSB17: Repeat them to your children. Talk about them when you sit in your house and when you walk along the road, when you lie down and when you get up.
5_6_7.AMP: You shall teach them diligently to your children [impressing God's precepts on their minds and penetrating their hearts with His truths] and shall speak of them when you sit in your house and when you walk on the road and when you lie down and when you get up.
5_6_7.MSG: and then get them inside your children. Talk about them wherever you are, sitting at home or walking in the street; talk about them from the time you get up in the morning to when you fall into bed at night.
5_6_7.NIV: Impress them on your children. Talk about them when you sit at home and when you walk along the road, when you lie down and when you get up.
5_6_7.NRSVCE: Recite them to your children and talk about them when you are at home and when you are away, when you lie down and when you rise.

5_6_8.NKJV: You shall bind them as a sign on your hand, and they shall be as frontlets between your eyes.
5_6_8.KJV: And thou shalt bind them for a sign upon thine hand, and they shall be as frontlets between thine eyes.
5_6_8.ESV: You shall bind them as a sign on your hand, and they shall be as frontlets between your eyes.
5_6_8.NASB: 'You shall bind them as a sign on your hand and they shall be as frontals on your forehead.
5_6_8.NLT: Tie them to your hands and wear them on your forehead as reminders.

5_6_8.CSB17: Bind them as a sign on your hand and let them be a symbol on your forehead.
5_6_8.AMP: And you shall bind them as a sign on your hand (forearm), and they shall be used as bands (frontals, frontlets) on your forehead.
5_6_8.MSG: Tie them on your hands and foreheads as a reminder;
5_6_8.NIV: Tie them as symbols on your hands and bind them on your foreheads.
5_6_8.NRSVCE: Bind them as a sign on your hand, fix them as an emblem on your forehead,

5_6_9.KJV: And thou shalt write them upon the posts of thy house, and on thy gates.
5_6_9.ESV: You shall write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
5_6_9.NASB: 'You shall write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
5_6_9.NLT: Write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
5_6_9.WEB: You shall write them on the door posts of your house, and on your gates.
5_6_9.CSB17: Write them on the doorposts of your house and on your city gates.
5_6_9.AMP: You shall write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
5_6_9.MSG: inscribe them on the doorposts of your homes and on your city gates.
5_6_9.NIV: Write them on the doorframes of your houses and on your gates.
5_6_9.NRSVCE: and write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.

5_6_10.KJV: And it shall be, when the LORD thy God shall have brought thee into the land which he sware unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give thee great and goodly cities, which thou buildedst not,

5_6_10.NASB: 'Then it shall come about when the LORD your God brings you into the land which He swore to your fathers, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob, to give you, great and splendid cities which you did not build,
5_6_10.NLT: “The LORD your God will soon bring you into the land he swore to give you when he made a vow to your ancestors Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob. It is a land with large, prosperous cities that you did not build.
5_6_10.WEB: It shall be, when Yahweh your God brings you into the land which he swore to your fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give you, great and goodly cities, which you didn’t build,

5_6_10.NIV: When the Lord your God brings you into the land he swore to your fathers, to Abraham, Isaac and Jacob, to give you—a land with large, flourishing cities you did not build,
5_6_10.NRSVCE: When the LORD your God has brought you into the land that he swore to your ancestors, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give you — a land with fine, large cities that you did not build,

5_6_11.NKJV: houses full of all good things, which you did not fill, hewn-out wells which you did not dig, vineyards and olive trees which you did not plant— when you have eaten and are full—
5_6_11.KJV: And houses full of all good things, which thou filledst not, and wells digged, which thou diggedst not, vineyards and olive trees, which thou plantedst not; when thou shalt have eaten and be full;
5_6_11.ESV: and houses full of all good things that you did not fill, and cisterns that you did not dig, and vineyards and olive trees that you did not plant — and when you eat and are full,

5_6_11.MSG: well-furnished houses you didn't buy, come upon wells you didn't dig, vineyards and olive orchards you didn't plant. When you take it all in and settle down, pleased and content,
5_6_11.NIV: houses filled with all kinds of good things you did not provide, wells you did not dig, and vineyards and olive groves you did not plant—then when you eat and are satisfied,
5_6_11.NRSVCE: houses filled with all sorts of goods that you did not fill, hewn cisterns that you did not hew, vineyards and olive groves that you did not plant — and when you have eaten your fill,

5_6_12.NKJV: then beware, lest you forget the LORD who brought you out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage.
5_6_12.KJV: Then beware lest thou forget the LORD, which brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage. bondage: Heb. bondmen or, servants
5_6_12.ESV: then take care lest you forget the LORD, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.
5_6_12.NASB: then watch yourself, that you do not forget the LORD who brought you from the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.
5_6_12.NLT: be careful not to forget the LORD, who rescued you from slavery in the land of Egypt.
5_6_12.WEB: then beware lest you forget Yahweh, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage.
5_6_12.CSB17: be careful not to forget the LORD who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the place of slavery.
5_6_12.AMP: then beware that you do not forget the LORD who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.
5_6_12.MSG: make sure you don't forget how you got there—God brought you out of slavery in Egypt.
5_6_12.NIV: be careful that you do not forget the Lord, who brought you out of Egypt, out of the land of slavery.
5_6_12.NRSVCE: take care that you do not forget the LORD, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.

5_6_13.NKJV: You shall fear the LORD your God and serve Him, and shall take oaths in His name.
5_6_13.KJV: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God, and serve him, and shalt swear by his name.
5_6_13.ESV: It is the LORD your God you shall fear. Him you shall serve and by his name you shall swear.
5_6_13.NASB: 'You shall fear [only] the LORD your God; and you shall worship Him and swear by His name.
5_6_13.NLT: You must fear the LORD your God and serve him. When you take an oath, you must use only his name.
5_6_13.WEB: You shall fear Yahweh your God; and you shall serve him, and shall swear by his name.
5_6_13.CSB17: Fear the LORD your God, worship him, and take your oaths in his name.
5_6_13.AMP: You shall fear [only] the LORD your God; and you shall serve Him [with awe-filled reverence and profound respect] and swear [oaths] by His name [alone].
5_6_13.MSG: Deeply respect God, your God. Serve and worship him exclusively. Back up your promises with his name only.
5_6_13.NIV: Fear the Lord your God, serve him only and take your oaths in his name.
5_6_13.NRSVCE: The LORD your God you shall fear; him you shall serve, and by his name alone you shall swear.

5_6_14.KJV: Ye shall not go after other gods, of the gods of the people which are round about you;
5_6_14.ESV: You shall not go after other gods, the gods of the peoples who are around you —
5_6_14.NASB: 'You shall not follow other gods, any of the gods of the peoples who surround you,
5_6_14.NLT: “You must not worship any of the gods of neighboring nations,

5_6_14.CSB17: Do not follow other gods, the gods of the peoples around you,
5_6_14.AMP: You shall not follow other gods, any of the gods of the peoples who surround you,
5_6_14.MSG: Don't fool around with other gods, the gods of your neighbors,
5_6_14.NIV: Do not follow other gods, the gods of the peoples around you;
5_6_14.NRSVCE: Do not follow other gods, any of the gods of the peoples who are all around you,

5_6_15.NKJV: (for the LORD your God is a jealous God among you), lest the anger of the LORD your God be aroused against you and destroy you from the face of the earth.
5_6_15.KJV: (For the LORD thy God is a jealous God among you) lest the anger of the LORD thy God be kindled against thee, and destroy thee from off the face of the earth.
5_6_15.ESV: for the LORD your God in your midst is a jealous God — lest the anger of the LORD your God be kindled against you, and he destroy you from off the face of the earth.
5_6_15.NASB: for the LORD your God in the midst of you is a jealous God; otherwise the anger of the LORD your God will be kindled against you, and He will wipe you off the face of the earth.
5_6_15.NLT: for the LORD your God, who lives among you, is a jealous God. His anger will flare up against you, and he will wipe you from the face of the earth.
5_6_15.WEB: for Yahweh your God among you is a jealous God; lest the anger of Yahweh your God be kindled against you, and he destroy you from off the face of the earth.
5_6_15.CSB17: for the LORD your God, who is among you, is a jealous God. Otherwise, the LORD your God will become angry with you and obliterate you from the face of the earth.
5_6_15.AMP: for the LORD your God who is among you is a jealous (impassioned) God [demanding what is rightfully and uniquely His]—otherwise the anger of the LORD your God will be kindled and burn against you, and He will destroy you from the face of the earth.
5_6_15.MSG: because God, your God, who is alive among you is a jealous God. Don't provoke him, igniting his hot anger that would burn you right off the face of the Earth.
5_6_15.NIV: for the Lord your God, who is among you, is a jealous God and his anger will burn against you, and he will destroy you from the face of the land.
5_6_15.NRSVCE: because the LORD your God, who is present with you, is a jealous God. The anger of the LORD your God would be kindled against you and he would destroy you from the face of the earth.

5_6_16.NKJV: “You shall not tempt the LORD your God as you tempted Him in Massah.
5_6_16.KJV: Ye shall not tempt the LORD your God, as ye tempted him in Massah.
5_6_16.ESV: “You shall not put the LORD your God to the test, as you tested him at Massah.
5_6_16.NASB: 'You shall not put the LORD your God to the test, as you tested [Him] at Massah.
5_6_16.NLT: You must not test the LORD your God as you did when you complained at Massah.
5_6_16.WEB: You shall not tempt Yahweh your God, as you tempted him in Massah.
5_6_16.CSB17: Do not test the LORD your God as you tested him at Massah.
5_6_16.AMP: "You shall not put the LORD your God to the test, as you tested Him at Massah.
5_6_16.MSG: Don't push God, your God, to the wall as you did that day at Massah, the Testing-Place.
5_6_16.NIV: Do not test the Lord your God as you did at Massah.
5_6_16.NRSVCE: Do not put the LORD your God to the test, as you tested him at Massah.

5_6_17.NKJV: You shall diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, His testimonies, and His statutes which He has commanded you.
5_6_17.KJV: Ye shall diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and his testimonies, and his statutes, which he hath commanded thee.
5_6_17.ESV: You shall diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and his testimonies and his statutes, which he has commanded you.
5_6_17.NASB: 'You should diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and His testimonies and His statutes which He has commanded you.
5_6_17.NLT: You must diligently obey the commands of the LORD your God — all the laws and decrees he has given you.
5_6_17.WEB: You shall diligently keep the commandments of Yahweh your God, and his testimonies, and his statutes, which he has commanded you.
5_6_17.CSB17: Carefully observe the commands of the LORD your God, the decrees and statutes he has commanded you.
5_6_17.AMP: You shall diligently keep [foremost in your thoughts and actively do] the commandments of the LORD your God, and His testimonies and His statutes which He has commanded you.
5_6_17.MSG: Carefully keep the commands of God, your God, all the requirements and regulations he gave you.
5_6_17.NIV: Be sure to keep the commands of the Lord your God and the stipulations and decrees he has given you.
5_6_17.NRSVCE: You must diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and his decrees, and his statutes that he has commanded you.

5_6_18.NKJV: And you shall do what is right and good in the sight of the LORD, that it may be well with you, and that you may go in and possess the good land of which the LORD swore to your fathers,
5_6_18.KJV: And thou shalt do that which is right and good in the sight of the LORD: that it may be well with thee, and that thou mayest go in and possess the good land which the LORD sware unto thy fathers,
5_6_18.ESV: And you shall do what is right and good in the sight of the LORD, that it may go well with you, and that you may go in and take possession of the good land that the LORD swore to give to your fathers
5_6_18.NASB: 'You shall do what is right and good in the sight of the LORD, that it may be well with you and that you may go in and possess the good land which the LORD swore to [give] your fathers,

5_6_18.MSG: Do what is right; do what is good in God's sight so you'll live a good life and be able to march in and take this pleasant land that God so solemnly promised through your ancestors,
5_6_18.NIV: Do what is right and good in the Lord’s sight, so that it may go well with you and you may go in and take over the good land that the Lord promised on oath to your forefathers,
5_6_18.NRSVCE: Do what is right and good in the sight of the LORD, so that it may go well with you, and so that you may go in and occupy the good land that the LORD swore to your ancestors to give you,

5_6_20.NKJV: “When your son asks you in time to come, saying, ‘What is the meaning of the testimonies, the statutes, and the judgments which the LORD our God has commanded you?’
5_6_20.KJV: And when thy son asketh thee in time to come, saying, What mean the testimonies, and the statutes, and the judgments, which the LORD our God hath commanded you? in: Heb. to morrow
5_6_20.ESV: “When your son asks you in time to come, ‘What is the meaning of the testimonies and the statutes and the rules that the LORD our God has commanded you?’
5_6_20.NASB: 'When your son asks you in time to come, saying, 'What [do] the testimonies and the statutes and the judgments [mean] which the LORD our God commanded you?'
5_6_20.NLT: “In the future your children will ask you, ‘What is the meaning of these laws, decrees, and regulations that the LORD our God has commanded us to obey?’
5_6_20.WEB: When your son asks you in time to come, saying, “What do the testimonies, the statutes, and the ordinances, which Yahweh our God has commanded you mean?”
5_6_20.CSB17: “When your son asks you in the future, ‘What is the meaning of the decrees, statutes, and ordinances that the LORD our God has commanded you?’

5_6_20.NIV: In the future, when your son asks you, “What is the meaning of the stipulations, decrees and laws the Lord our God has commanded you?”
5_6_20.NRSVCE: When your children ask you in time to come, “What is the meaning of the decrees and the statutes and the ordinances that the LORD our God has commanded you?”

5_6_22.KJV: And the LORD shewed signs and wonders, great and sore, upon Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his household, before our eyes: sore: Heb. evil

5_6_22.NRSVCE: The LORD displayed before our eyes great and awesome signs and wonders against Egypt, against Pharaoh and all his household.

5_6_23.NKJV: Then He brought us out from there, that He might bring us in, to give us the land of which He swore to our fathers.
5_6_23.KJV: And he brought us out from thence, that he might bring us in, to give us the land which he sware unto our fathers.

5_6_23.NLT: He brought us out of Egypt so he could give us this land he had sworn to give our ancestors.

5_6_23.NIV: But he brought us out from there to bring us in and give us the land that he promised on oath to our forefathers.
5_6_23.NRSVCE: He brought us out from there in order to bring us in, to give us the land that he promised on oath to our ancestors.

5_6_24.NKJV: And the LORD commanded us to observe all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our good always, that He might preserve us alive, as it is this day.
5_6_24.KJV: And the LORD commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our good always, that he might preserve us alive, as it is at this day.
5_6_24.ESV: And the LORD commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our good always, that he might preserve us alive, as we are this day.
5_6_24.NASB: 'So the LORD commanded us to observe all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God for our good always and for our survival, as [it is] today.
5_6_24.NLT: And the LORD our God commanded us to obey all these decrees and to fear him so he can continue to bless us and preserve our lives, as he has done to this day.
5_6_24.WEB: Yahweh commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear Yahweh our God, for our good always, that he might preserve us alive, as we are today.
5_6_24.CSB17: The LORD commanded us to follow all these statutes and to fear the LORD our God for our prosperity always and for our preservation, as it is today.
5_6_24.AMP: So the LORD commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear [and worship] the LORD our God [with awe-filled reverence and profound respect] for our good always and so that He might preserve us alive, as it is today.
5_6_24.MSG: That's why God commanded us to follow all these rules, so that we would live reverently before God, our God, as he gives us this good life, keeping us alive for a long time to come.
5_6_24.NIV: The Lord commanded us to obey all these decrees and to fear the Lord our God, so that we might always prosper and be kept alive, as is the case today.
5_6_24.NRSVCE: Then the LORD commanded us to observe all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our lasting good, so as to keep us alive, as is now the case.

5_6_25.NKJV: Then it will be righteousness for us, if we are careful to observe all these commandments before the LORD our God, as He has commanded us.’

5_7_1.NKJV: “When the LORD your God brings you into the land which you go to possess, and has cast out many nations before you, the Hittites and the Girgashites and the Amorites and the Canaanites and the Perizzites and the Hivites and the Jebusites, seven nations greater and mightier than you,

5_7_1.CSB17: “When the LORD your God brings you into the land you are entering to possess, and he drives out many nations before you — the Hethites, Girgashites, Amorites, Canaanites, Perizzites, Hivites and Jebusites, seven nations more numerous and powerful than you —
5_7_1.AMP: "When the LORD your God brings you into the land which you are entering to possess, and has cleared away many nations before you, the Hittite and the Girgashite and the Amorite and the Canaanite and the Perizzite and the Hivite and the Jebusite, seven nations greater and mightier than you,

Those seven nations are all bigger and stronger than you are.

5_7_6.NASB: 'For you are a holy people to the LORD your God; the LORD your God has chosen you to be a people for His own possession out of all the peoples who are on the face of the earth.
5_7_6.NLT: For you are a holy people, who belong to the LORD your God. Of all the people on earth, the LORD your God has chosen you to be his own special treasure.

5_7_6.CSB17: For you are a holy people belonging to the LORD your God. The LORD your God has chosen you to be his own possession out of all the peoples on the face of the earth.
5_7_6.AMP: For you are a holy people [set apart] to the LORD your God; the LORD your God has chosen you out of all the peoples on the face of the earth to be a people for His own possession [that is, His very special treasure].

5_7_6.NIV: For you are a people holy to the Lord your God. The Lord your God has chosen you out of all the peoples on the face of the earth to be his people, his treasured possession.
5_7_6.NRSVCE: For you are a people holy to the LORD your God; the LORD your God has chosen you out of all the peoples on earth to be his people, his treasured possession.

5_7_7.NKJV: The LORD did not set His love on you nor choose you because you were more in number than any other people, for you were the least of all peoples;

5_7_7.ESV: It was not because you were more in number than any other people that the LORD set his love on you and chose you, for you were the fewest of all peoples,
5_7_7.NASB: 'The LORD did not set His love on you nor choose you because you were more in number than any of the peoples, for you were the fewest of all peoples,

5_7_7.AMP: "The LORD did not love you and choose you because you were greater in number than any of the other peoples, for you were the fewest of all peoples.

5_7_7.NRSVCE: It was not because you were more numerous than any other people that the LORD set his heart on you and chose you — for you were the fewest of all peoples.

5_7_8.CSB17: But because the LORD loved you and kept the oath he swore to your fathers, he brought you out with a strong hand and redeemed you from the place of slavery, from the power of Pharaoh king of Egypt.
5_7_8.AMP: But because the LORD loves you and is keeping the oath which He swore to your fathers, the LORD has brought you out with a mighty hand and redeemed (bought) you from the house of slavery, from the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt.
5_7_8.MSG: He did it out of sheer love, keeping the promise he made to your ancestors. God stepped in and mightily bought you back out of that world of slavery, freed you from the iron grip of Pharaoh king of Egypt.
5_7_8.NIV: But it was because the Lord loved you and kept the oath he swore to your forefathers that he brought you out with a mighty hand and redeemed you from the land of slavery, from the power of Pharaoh king of Egypt.
5_7_8.NRSVCE: It was because the LORD loved you and kept the oath that he swore to your ancestors, that the LORD has brought you out with a mighty hand, and redeemed you from the house of slavery, from the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt.

5_7_9.NKJV: “Therefore know that the LORD your God, He is God, the faithful God who keeps covenant and mercy for a thousand generations with those who love Him and keep His commandments;
5_7_9.KJV: Know therefore that the LORD thy God, he is God, the faithful God, which keepeth covenant and mercy with them that love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations;
5_7_9.ESV: Know therefore that the LORD your God is God, the faithful God who keeps covenant and steadfast love with those who love him and keep his commandments, to a thousand generations,
5_7_9.NASB: 'Know therefore that the LORD your God, He is God, the faithful God, who keeps His covenant and His lovingkindness to a thousandth generation with those who love Him and keep His commandments;
5_7_9.NLT: Understand, therefore, that the LORD your God is indeed God. He is the faithful God who keeps his covenant for a thousand generations and lavishes his unfailing love on those who love him and obey his commands.
5_7_9.WEB: Know therefore that Yahweh your God himself is God, the faithful God, who keeps covenant and loving kindness with them who love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations,
5_7_9.CSB17: Know that the LORD your God is God, the faithful God who keeps his gracious covenant loyalty for a thousand generations with those who love him and keep his commands.
5_7_9.AMP: Therefore know [without any doubt] and understand that the LORD your God, He is God, the faithful God, who is keeping His covenant and His [steadfast] lovingkindness to a thousand generations with those who love Him and keep His commandments;
5_7_9.MSG: Know this: God, your God, is God indeed, a God you can depend upon. He keeps his covenant of loyal love with those who love him and observe his commandments for a thousand generations.
5_7_9.NIV: Know therefore that the Lord your God is God; he is the faithful God, keeping his covenant of love to a thousand generations of those who love him and keep his commands.
5_7_9.NRSVCE: Know therefore that the LORD your God is God, the faithful God who maintains covenant loyalty with those who love him and keep his commandments, to a thousand generations,

5_7_10.NKJV: and He repays those who hate Him to their face, to destroy them. He will not be slack with him who hates Him; He will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.KJV: And repayeth them that hate him to their face, to destroy them: he will not be slack to him that hateth him, he will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.ESV: and repays to their face those who hate him, by destroying them. He will not be slack with one who hates him. He will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.NASB: but repays those who hate Him to their faces, to destroy them; He will not delay with him who hates Him, He will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.NLT: But he does not hesitate to punish and destroy those who reject him.
5_7_10.WEB: and repays those who hate him to their face, to destroy them. He will not be slack to him who hates him. He will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.CSB17: But he directly pays back and destroys those who hate him. He will not hesitate to pay back directly the one who hates him.
5_7_10.AMP: but repays those who hate Him to their faces, by destroying them; He will not hesitate with him who hates Him, He will repay him to his face.
5_7_10.MSG: But he also pays back those who hate him, pays them the wages of death; he isn't slow to pay them off—those who hate him, he pays right on time.
5_7_10.NIV: Butthose who hate him he will repay to their face by destruction;he will not be slow to repay to their face those who hate him.
5_7_10.NRSVCE: and who repays in their own person those who reject him. He does not delay but repays in their own person those who reject him.

5_7_11.NKJV: Therefore you shall keep the commandment, the statutes, and the judgments which I command you today, to observe them.
5_7_11.KJV: Thou shalt therefore keep the commandments, and the statutes, and the judgments, which I command thee this day, to do them.
5_7_11.ESV: You shall therefore be careful to do the commandment and the statutes and the rules that I command you today.
5_7_11.NASB: 'Therefore, you shall keep the commandment and the statutes and the judgments which I am commanding you today, to do them.
5_7_11.NLT: Therefore, you must obey all these commands, decrees, and regulations I am giving you today.
5_7_11.WEB: You shall therefore keep the commandments, the statutes, and the ordinances, which I command you today, to do them.
5_7_11.CSB17: So keep the command — the statutes and ordinances — that I am giving you to follow today.
5_7_11.AMP: Therefore, you shall keep (follow, obey) the commandment and the statutes and judgments (precepts) which I am commanding you today.
5_7_11.MSG: So keep the command and the rules and regulations that I command you today. Do them.
5_7_11.NIV: Therefore, take care to follow the commands, decrees and laws I give you today.
5_7_11.NRSVCE: Therefore, observe diligently the commandment — the statutes and the ordinances — that I am commanding you today.

5_7_12.NKJV: “Then it shall come to pass, because you listen to these judgments, and keep and do them, that the LORD your God will keep with you the covenant and the mercy which He swore to your fathers.
5_7_12.KJV: Wherefore it shall come to pass, if ye hearken to these judgments, and keep, and do them, that the LORD thy God shall keep unto thee the covenant and the mercy which he sware unto thy fathers: if: Heb. because
5_7_12.ESV: “And because you listen to these rules and keep and do them, the LORD your God will keep with you the covenant and the steadfast love that he swore to your fathers.
5_7_12.NASB: 'Then it shall come about, because you listen to these judgments and keep and do them, that the LORD your God will keep with you His covenant and His lovingkindness which He swore to your forefathers.
5_7_12.NLT: “If you listen to these regulations and faithfully obey them, the LORD your God will keep his covenant of unfailing love with you, as he promised with an oath to your ancestors.
5_7_12.WEB: It shall happen, because you listen to these ordinances, and keep and do them, that Yahweh your God will keep with you the covenant and the loving kindness which he swore to your fathers.
5_7_12.CSB17: “If you listen to and are careful to keep these ordinances, the LORD your God will keep his covenant loyalty with you, as he swore to your fathers.
5_7_12.AMP: "Then it shall come about, because you listen to these judgments and keep and do them, that the LORD your God will keep with you the covenant and the [steadfast] lovingkindness which He swore to your fathers.
5_7_12.MSG: And this is what will happen: When you, on your part, will obey these directives, keeping and following them, God, on his part, will keep the covenant of loyal love that he made with your ancestors:
5_7_12.NIV: If you pay attention to these laws and are careful to follow them, then the Lord your God will keep his covenant of love with you, as he swore to your forefathers.
5_7_12.NRSVCE: If you heed these ordinances, by diligently observing them, the LORD your God will maintain with you the covenant loyalty that he swore to your ancestors;

5_7_13.NKJV: And He will love you and bless you and multiply you; He will also bless the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your land, your grain and your new wine and your oil, the increase of your cattle and the offspring of your flock, in the land of which He swore to your fathers to give you.
5_7_13.KJV: And he will love thee, and bless thee, and multiply thee: he will also bless the fruit of thy womb, and the fruit of thy land, thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil, the increase of thy kine, and the flocks of thy sheep, in the land which he sware unto thy fathers to give thee.
5_7_13.ESV: He will love you, bless you, and multiply you. He will also bless the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground, your grain and your wine and your oil, the increase of your herds and the young of your flock, in the land that he swore to your fathers to give you.
5_7_13.NASB: 'He will love you and bless you and multiply you; He will also bless the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground, your grain and your new wine and your oil, the increase of your herd and the young of your flock, in the land which He swore to your forefathers to give you.
5_7_13.NLT: He will love you and bless you, and he will give you many children. He will give fertility to your land and your animals. When you arrive in the land he swore to give your ancestors, you will have large harvests of grain, new wine, and olive oil, and great herds of cattle, sheep, and goats.
5_7_13.WEB: He will love you, bless you, multiply you. He will also bless the fruit of your body and the fruit of your ground, your grain and your new wine and your oil, the increase of your livestock and the young of your flock, in the land which he swore to your fathers to give you.
5_7_13.CSB17: He will love you, bless you, and multiply you. He will bless your offspring, and the produce of your land — your grain, new wine, and fresh oil — the young of your herds, and the newborn of your flocks, in the land he swore to your fathers that he would give you.
5_7_13.AMP: He will love you and bless you and multiply you; He will also bless the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your land, your grain and your new wine and your [olive] oil, the offspring of your cattle and the young of your flock, in the land which He swore to your fathers to give you.
5_7_13.MSG: He will love you,he will bless you,he will increase you.He will bless the babies from your womb and the harvest of grain, new wine, and oil from your fields; he'll bless the calves from your herds and lambs from your flocks in the country he promised your ancestors that he'd give you.
5_7_13.NIV: He will love you and bless you and increase your numbers. He will bless the fruit of your womb, the crops of your land—your grain, new wine and oil—the calves of your herds and the lambs of your flocks in the land that he swore to your forefathers to give you.
5_7_13.NRSVCE: he will love you, bless you, and multiply you; he will bless the fruit of your womb and the fruit of your ground, your grain and your wine and your oil, the increase of your cattle and the issue of your flock, in the land that he swore to your ancestors to give you.

5_7_14.NKJV: You shall be blessed above all peoples; there shall not be a male or female barren among you or among your livestock.
5_7_14.KJV: Thou shalt be blessed above all people: there shall not be male or female barren among you, or among your cattle.
5_7_14.ESV: You shall be blessed above all peoples. There shall not be male or female barren among you or among your livestock.
5_7_14.NASB: 'You shall be blessed above all peoples; there will be no male or female barren among you or among your cattle.
5_7_14.NLT: You will be blessed above all the nations of the earth. None of your men or women will be childless, and all your livestock will bear young.
5_7_14.WEB: You shall be blessed above all peoples. There shall not be male or female barren among you, or among your livestock.
5_7_14.CSB17: You will be blessed above all peoples; there will be no infertile male or female among you or your livestock.
5_7_14.AMP: You shall be blessed above all peoples; there will be no male or female barren (childless, infertile) among you or among your cattle.
5_7_14.MSG: You'll be blessed beyond all other peoples: no sterility or barrenness in you or your animals.
5_7_14.NIV: You will be blessed more than any other people; none of your men or women will be childless, nor any of your livestock without young.
5_7_14.NRSVCE: You shall be the most blessed of peoples, with neither sterility nor barrenness among you or your livestock.

5_7_15.NKJV: And the LORD will take away from you all sickness, and will afflict you with none of the terrible diseases of Egypt which you have known, but will lay them on all those who hate you.
5_7_15.KJV: And the LORD will take away from thee all sickness, and will put none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which thou knowest, upon thee; but will lay them upon all them that hate thee.
5_7_15.ESV: And the LORD will take away from you all sickness, and none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which you knew, will he inflict on you, but he will lay them on all who hate you.
5_7_15.NASB: 'The LORD will remove from you all sickness; and He will not put on you any of the harmful diseases of Egypt which you have known, but He will lay them on all who hate you.
5_7_15.NLT: And the LORD will protect you from all sickness. He will not let you suffer from the terrible diseases you knew in Egypt, but he will inflict them on all your enemies!
5_7_15.WEB: Yahweh will take away from you all sickness; and none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which you know, will he put on you, but will lay them on all those who hate you.
5_7_15.CSB17: The LORD will remove all sickness from you; he will not put on you all the terrible diseases of Egypt that you know about, but he will inflict them on all who hate you.
5_7_15.AMP: The LORD will take away from you all sickness; and He will not subject you to any of the harmful diseases of Egypt which you have known, but He will impose them on all [those] who hate you.
5_7_15.MSG: God will get rid of all sickness. And all the evil afflictions you experienced in Egypt he'll put not on you but on those who hate you.
5_7_15.NIV: The Lord will keep you free from every disease. He will not inflict on you the horrible diseases you knew in Egypt, but he will inflict them on all who hate you.
5_7_15.NRSVCE: The LORD will turn away from you every illness; all the dread diseases of Egypt that you experienced, he will not inflict on you, but he will lay them on all who hate you.

5_7_16.NKJV: Also you shall destroy all the peoples whom the LORD your God delivers over to you; your eye shall have no pity on them; nor shall you serve their gods, for that will be a snare to you.
5_7_16.KJV: And thou shalt consume all the people which the LORD thy God shall deliver thee; thine eye shall have no pity upon them: neither shalt thou serve their gods; for that will be a snare unto thee.
5_7_16.ESV: And you shall consume all the peoples that the LORD your God will give over to you. Your eye shall not pity them, neither shall you serve their gods, for that would be a snare to you.
5_7_16.NASB: 'You shall consume all the peoples whom the LORD your God will deliver to you; your eye shall not pity them, nor shall you serve their gods, for that [would be] a snare to you.
5_7_16.NLT: “You must destroy all the nations the LORD your God hands over to you. Show them no mercy, and do not worship their gods, or they will trap you.

5_7_16.CSB17: You must destroy all the peoples the LORD your God is delivering over to you and not look on them with pity. Do not worship their gods, for that will be a snare to you.
5_7_16.AMP: And you shall consume all the peoples whom the LORD your God will give over to you; your eye shall not pity them, nor shall you serve their gods, for that would be a [deadly] trap to you.
5_7_16.MSG: You'll make mincemeat of all the peoples that God, your God, hands over to you. Don't feel sorry for them. And don't worship their gods—they'll trap you for sure.
5_7_16.NIV: You must destroy all the peoples the Lord your God gives over to you. Do not look on them with pity and do not serve their gods, for that will be a snare to you.
5_7_16.NRSVCE: You shall devour all the peoples that the LORD your God is giving over to you, showing them no pity; you shall not serve their gods, for that would be a snare to you.

5_7_17.ESV: “If you say in your heart, ‘These nations are greater than I. How can I dispossess them?’
5_7_17.NASB: 'If you should say in your heart, 'These nations are greater than I; how can I dispossess them?'

5_7_17.CSB17: “If you say to yourself, ‘These nations are greater than I; how can I drive them out?’
5_7_17.AMP: "If you say in your heart, 'These nations are greater than I am; how can I dispossess them?'

5_7_17.NIV: You may say to yourselves, “These nations are stronger than we are. How can we drive them out?”
5_7_17.NRSVCE: If you say to yourself, “These nations are more numerous than I; how can I dispossess them?”

5_7_19.KJV: The great temptations which thine eyes saw, and the signs, and the wonders, and the mighty hand, and the stretched out arm, whereby the LORD thy God brought thee out: so shall the LORD thy God do unto all the people of whom thou art afraid .

And remember the miraculous signs and wonders, and the strong hand and powerful arm with which he brought you out of Egypt. The LORD your God will use this same power against all the people you fear.
