5_7_19.NIV: You saw with your own eyes the great trials, the miraculous signs and wonders, the mighty hand and outstretched arm, with which the Lord your God brought you out. The Lord your God will do the same to all the peoples you now fear.
5_7_19.NRSVCE: the great trials that your eyes saw, the signs and wonders, the mighty hand and the outstretched arm by which the LORD your God brought you out. The LORD your God will do the same to all the peoples of whom you are afraid.

5_7_20.NKJV: Moreover the LORD your God will send the hornet among them until those who are left, who hide themselves from you, are destroyed.
5_7_20.KJV: Moreover the LORD thy God will send the hornet among them, until they that are left, and hide themselves from thee, be destroyed.

5_7_20.NASB: 'Moreover, the LORD your God will send the hornet against them, until those who are left and hide themselves from you perish.
5_7_20.NLT: And then the LORD your God will send terror to drive out the few survivors still hiding from you!

5_7_20.CSB17: The LORD your God will also send hornets against them until all the survivors and those hiding from you perish.
5_7_20.AMP: Moreover, the LORD your God will send the hornet (His terror) against them, until those who are left and hide themselves from you perish.
5_7_20.MSG: And to top it off, the Hornet. God will unleash the Hornet on them until every survivor-in-hiding is dead.
5_7_20.NIV: Moreover, the Lord your God will send the hornet among them until even the survivors who hide from you have perished.
5_7_20.NRSVCE: Moreover, the LORD your God will send the pestilence against them, until even the survivors and the fugitives are destroyed.

5_7_21.NKJV: You shall not be terrified of them; for the LORD your God, the great and awesome God, is among you.
5_7_21.KJV: Thou shalt not be affrighted at them: for the LORD thy God is among you, a mighty God and terrible.
5_7_21.ESV: You shall not be in dread of them, for the LORD your God is in your midst, a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.NASB: 'You shall not dread them, for the LORD your God is in your midst, a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.NLT: “No, do not be afraid of those nations, for the LORD your God is among you, and he is a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.WEB: You shall not be scared of them; for Yahweh your God is among you, a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.CSB17: Don’t be terrified of them, for the LORD your God, a great and awesome God, is among you.
5_7_21.AMP: You shall not dread them, for the LORD your God is in your midst, a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.MSG: So don't be intimidated by them. God, your God, is among you—God majestic, God awesome.
5_7_21.NIV: Do not be terrified by them, for the Lord your God, who is among you, is a great and awesome God.
5_7_21.NRSVCE: Have no dread of them, for the LORD your God, who is present with you, is a great and awesome God.

5_7_22.NKJV: And the LORD your God will drive out those nations before you little by little; you will be unable to destroy them at once, lest the beasts of the field become too numerous for you.
5_7_22.KJV: And the LORD thy God will put out those nations before thee by little and little: thou mayest not consume them at once, lest the beasts of the field increase upon thee. put: Heb. pluck off
5_7_22.ESV: The LORD your God will clear away these nations before you little by little. You may not make an end of them at once, lest the wild beasts grow too numerous for you.
5_7_22.NASB: 'The LORD your God will clear away these nations before you little by little; you will not be able to put an end to them quickly, for the wild beasts would grow too numerous for you.
5_7_22.NLT: The LORD your God will drive those nations out ahead of you little by little. You will not clear them away all at once, otherwise the wild animals would multiply too quickly for you.
5_7_22.WEB: Yahweh your God will cast out those nations before you little by little. You may not consume them at once, lest the animals of the field increase on you.
5_7_22.CSB17: The LORD your God will drive out these nations before you little by little. You will not be able to destroy them all at once; otherwise, the wild animals will become too numerous for you.
5_7_22.AMP: The LORD your God will clear away these nations before you little by little; you will not be able to put an end to them quickly, for [if you did] the wild animals would become too numerous for you.
5_7_22.MSG: God, your God, will get rid of these nations, bit by bit. You won't be permitted to wipe them out all at once lest the wild animals take over and overwhelm you.
5_7_22.NIV: The Lord your God will drive out those nations before you, little by little. You will not be allowed to eliminate them all at once, or the wild animals will multiply around you.
5_7_22.NRSVCE: The LORD your God will clear away these nations before you little by little; you will not be able to make a quick end of them, otherwise the wild animals would become too numerous for you.

5_7_23.NKJV: But the LORD your God will deliver them over to you, and will inflict defeat upon them until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.KJV: But the LORD thy God shall deliver them unto thee, and shall destroy them with a mighty destruction, until they be destroyed. unto: Heb. before thy face
5_7_23.ESV: But the LORD your God will give them over to you and throw them into great confusion, until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.NASB: 'But the LORD your God will deliver them before you, and will throw them into great confusion until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.NLT: But the LORD your God will hand them over to you. He will throw them into complete confusion until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.WEB: But Yahweh your God will deliver them up before you, and will confuse them with a great confusion, until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.CSB17: The LORD your God will give them over to you and throw them into great confusion until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.AMP: But the LORD your God will hand them over to you, and will confuse them with a great panic until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.MSG: But God, your God, will move them out of your way—he'll throw them into a huge panic until there's nothing left of them.
5_7_23.NIV: But the Lord your God will deliver them over to you, throwing them into great confusion until they are destroyed.
5_7_23.NRSVCE: But the LORD your God will give them over to you, and throw them into great panic, until they are destroyed.

5_7_24.NKJV: And He will deliver their kings into your hand, and you will destroy their name from under heaven; no one shall be able to stand against you until you have destroyed them.
5_7_24.KJV: And he shall deliver their kings into thine hand, and thou shalt destroy their name from under heaven: there shall no man be able to stand before thee, until thou have destroyed them.
5_7_24.ESV: And he will give their kings into your hand, and you shall make their name perish from under heaven. No one shall be able to stand against you until you have destroyed them.
5_7_24.NASB: 'He will deliver their kings into your hand so that you will make their name perish from under heaven; no man will be able to stand before you until you have destroyed them.
5_7_24.NLT: He will put their kings in your power, and you will erase their names from the face of the earth. No one will be able to stand against you, and you will destroy them all.
5_7_24.WEB: He will deliver their kings into your hand, and you shall make their name perish from under the sky. No one will be able to stand before you, until you have destroyed them.
5_7_24.CSB17: He will hand their kings over to you, and you will wipe out their names under heaven. No one will be able to stand against you; you will annihilate them.
5_7_24.AMP: And He will hand over their kings to you, and you will make their name perish from under heaven; no man will be able to stand before you until you have destroyed them.
5_7_24.MSG: He'll turn their kings over to you and you'll remove all trace of them under Heaven. Not one person will be able to stand up to you; you'll put an end to them all.
5_7_24.NIV: He will give their kings into your hand, and you will wipe out their names from under heaven. No one will be able to stand up against you; you will destroy them.
5_7_24.NRSVCE: He will hand their kings over to you and you shall blot out their name from under heaven; no one will be able to stand against you, until you have destroyed them.

5_7_25.NKJV: You shall burn the carved images of their gods with fire; you shall not covet the silver or gold that is on them, nor take it for yourselves, lest you be snared by it; for it is an abomination to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.KJV: The graven images of their gods shall ye burn with fire: thou shalt not desire the silver or gold that is on them, nor take it unto thee, lest thou be snared therein: for it is an abomination to the LORD thy God.
5_7_25.ESV: The carved images of their gods you shall burn with fire. You shall not covet the silver or the gold that is on them or take it for yourselves, lest you be ensnared by it, for it is an abomination to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.NASB: 'The graven images of their gods you are to burn with fire; you shall not covet the silver or the gold that is on them, nor take it for yourselves, or you will be snared by it, for it is an abomination to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.NLT: “You must burn their idols in fire, and you must not covet the silver or gold that covers them. You must not take it or it will become a trap to you, for it is detestable to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.WEB: You shall burn the engraved images of their gods with fire. You shall not covet the silver or the gold that is on them, nor take it for yourself, lest you be snared in it; for it is an abomination to Yahweh your God.
5_7_25.CSB17: Burn up the carved images of their gods. Don’t covet the silver and gold on the images and take it for yourself, or else you will be ensnared by it, for it is detestable to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.AMP: You shall burn the carved and sculpted images of their gods in the fire. You shall not covet the silver or gold that is on them, nor take it for yourselves, so that you will not be ensnared by it [in a deadly trap], for it is an abomination (repulsive) to the LORD your God.
5_7_25.MSG: Make sure you set fire to their carved gods. Don't get greedy for the veneer of silver and gold on them and take it for yourselves—you'll get trapped by it for sure. God hates it; it's an abomination to God, your God.
5_7_25.NIV: The images of their gods you are to burn in the fire. Do not covet the silver and gold on them, and do not take it for yourselves, or you will be ensnared by it, for it is detestable to the Lord your God.
5_7_25.NRSVCE: The images of their gods you shall burn with fire. Do not covet the silver or the gold that is on them and take it for yourself, because you could be ensnared by it; for it is abhorrent to the LORD your God.

5_7_26.NKJV: Nor shall you bring an abomination into your house, lest you be doomed to destruction like it. You shall utterly detest it and utterly abhor it, for it is an accursed thing.
5_7_26.KJV: Neither shalt thou bring an abomination into thine house, lest thou be a cursed thing like it: but thou shalt utterly detest it, and thou shalt utterly abhor it; for it is a cursed thing.
5_7_26.ESV: And you shall not bring an abominable thing into your house and become devoted to destruction like it. You shall utterly detest and abhor it, for it is devoted to destruction.
5_7_26.NASB: 'You shall not bring an abomination into your house, and like it come under the ban; you shall utterly detest it and you shall utterly abhor it, for it is something banned.
5_7_26.NLT: Do not bring any detestable objects into your home, for then you will be destroyed, just like them. You must utterly detest such things, for they are set apart for destruction.
5_7_26.WEB: You shall not bring an abomination into your house, and become a devoted thing like it. You shall utterly detest it, and you shall utterly abhor it; for it is a devoted thing.
5_7_26.CSB17: Do not bring any detestable thing into your house, or you will be set apart for destruction like it. You are to abhor and detest it utterly because it is set apart for destruction.
5_7_26.AMP: You shall not bring an abomination (idol) into your house, and like it come under the ban (doomed to destruction); you shall utterly detest and you shall utterly hate it, for it is something banned.
5_7_26.MSG: And don't dare bring one of these abominations home or you'll end up just like it, burned up as a holy destruction. No: It is forbidden! Hate it. Abominate it. Destroy it and preserve God's holiness.
5_7_26.NIV: Do not bring a detestable thing into your house or you, like it, will be set apart for destruction. Utterly abhor and detest it, for it is set apart for destruction.
5_7_26.NRSVCE: Do not bring an abhorrent thing into your house, or you will be set apart for destruction like it. You must utterly detest and abhor it, for it is set apart for destruction.

5_8_1.NKJV: “Every commandment which I command you today you must be careful to observe, that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land of which the LORD swore to your fathers.
5_8_1.KJV: All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the LORD sware unto your fathers.
5_8_1.ESV: “The whole commandment that I command you today you shall be careful to do, that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land that the LORD swore to give to your fathers.
5_8_1.NASB: 'All the commandments that I am commanding you today you shall be careful to do, that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the LORD swore [to give] to your forefathers.
5_8_1.NLT: “Be careful to obey all the commands I am giving you today. Then you will live and multiply, and you will enter and occupy the land the LORD swore to give your ancestors.
5_8_1.WEB: You shall observe to do all the commandments which I command you today, that you may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which Yahweh swore to your fathers.
5_8_1.CSB17: “Carefully follow every command I am giving you today, so that you may live and increase, and may enter and take possession of the land the LORD swore to your fathers.
5_8_1.AMP: "Every commandment that I am commanding you today you shall be careful to do, so that you may live and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the LORD swore [to give] to your fathers.
5_8_1.MSG: Keep and live out the entire commandment that I'm commanding you today so that you'll live and prosper and enter and own the land that God promised to your ancestors.
5_8_1.NIV: Do Not Forget the LordBe careful to follow every command I am giving you today, so that you may live and increase and may enter and possess the land that the Lord promised on oath to your forefathers.
5_8_1.NRSVCE: This entire commandment that I command you today you must diligently observe, so that you may live and increase, and go in and occupy the land that the LORD promised on oath to your ancestors.

5_8_2.NKJV: And you shall remember that the LORD your God led you all the way these forty years in the wilderness, to humble you and test you, to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep His commandments or not.
5_8_2.KJV: And thou shalt remember all the way which the LORD thy God led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, and to prove thee, to know what was in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no.
5_8_2.ESV: And you shall remember the whole way that the LORD your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, that he might humble you, testing you to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep his commandments or not.
5_8_2.NASB: 'You shall remember all the way which the LORD your God has led you in the wilderness these forty years, that He might humble you, testing you, to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep His commandments or not.
5_8_2.NLT: Remember how the LORD your God led you through the wilderness for these forty years, humbling you and testing you to prove your character, and to find out whether or not you would obey his commands.
5_8_2.WEB: You shall remember all the way which Yahweh your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, that he might humble you, to prove you, to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep his commandments, or not.
5_8_2.CSB17: Remember that the LORD your God led you on the entire journey these forty years in the wilderness, so that he might humble you and test you to know what was in your heart, whether or not you would keep his commands.
5_8_2.AMP: And you shall remember [always] all the ways which the LORD your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, so that He might humble you and test you, to know what was in your heart (mind), whether you would keep His commandments or not.
5_8_2.MSG: Remember every road that God led you on for those forty years in the wilderness, pushing you to your limits, testing you so that he would know what you were made of, whether you would keep his commandments or not.
5_8_2.NIV: Remember how the Lord your God led you all the way in the desert these forty years, to humble you and to test you in order to know what was in your heart, whether or not you would keep his commands.
5_8_2.NRSVCE: Remember the long way that the LORD your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, in order to humble you, testing you to know what was in your heart, whether or not you would keep his commandments.

5_8_3.NKJV: So He humbled you, allowed you to hunger, and fed you with manna which you did not know nor did your fathers know, that He might make you know that man shall not live by bread alone; but man lives by every word that proceeds from the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.KJV: And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of the LORD doth man live.
5_8_3.ESV: And he humbled you and let you hunger and fed you with manna, which you did not know, nor did your fathers know, that he might make you know that man does not live by bread alone, but man lives by every word that comes from the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.NASB: 'He humbled you and let you be hungry, and fed you with manna which you did not know, nor did your fathers know, that He might make you understand that man does not live by bread alone, but man lives by everything that proceeds out of the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.NLT: Yes, he humbled you by letting you go hungry and then feeding you with manna, a food previously unknown to you and your ancestors. He did it to teach you that people do not live by bread alone; rather, we live by every word that comes from the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.WEB: He humbled you, and allowed you to be hungry, and fed you with manna, which you didn’t know, neither did your fathers know; that he might teach you that man does not live by bread only, but man lives by every word that proceeds out of Yahweh’s mouth.
5_8_3.CSB17: He humbled you by letting you go hungry; then he gave you manna to eat, which you and your fathers had not known, so that you might learn that man does not live on bread alone but on every word that comes from the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.AMP: He humbled you and allowed you to be hungry and fed you with manna, [a substance] which you did not know, nor did your fathers know, so that He might make you understand [by personal experience] that man does not live by bread alone, but man lives by every word that proceeds out of the mouth of the LORD.
5_8_3.MSG: He put you through hard times. He made you go hungry. Then he fed you with manna, something neither you nor your parents knew anything about, so you would learn that men and women don't live by bread only; we live by every word that comes from God's mouth.
5_8_3.NIV: He humbled you, causing you to hunger and then feeding you with manna, which neither you nor your fathers had known, to teach you that man does not live on bread alone but on every word that comes from the mouth of the Lord.
5_8_3.NRSVCE: He humbled you by letting you hunger, then by feeding you with manna, with which neither you nor your ancestors were acquainted, in order to make you understand that one does not live by bread alone, but by every word that comes from the mouth of the LORD.

5_8_4.NKJV: Your garments did not wear out on you, nor did your foot swell these forty years.
5_8_4.KJV: Thy raiment waxed not old upon thee, neither did thy foot swell, these forty years.
5_8_4.ESV: Your clothing did not wear out on you and your foot did not swell these forty years.
5_8_4.NASB: 'Your clothing did not wear out on you, nor did your foot swell these forty years.
5_8_4.NLT: For all these forty years your clothes didn’t wear out, and your feet didn’t blister or swell.
5_8_4.WEB: Your clothing didn’t grow old on you, neither did your foot swell, these forty years.
5_8_4.CSB17: Your clothing did not wear out, and your feet did not swell these forty years.
5_8_4.AMP: Your clothing did not wear out on you, nor did your feet swell these forty years.
5_8_4.MSG: Your clothes didn't wear out and your feet didn't blister those forty years.
5_8_4.NIV: Your clothes did not wear out and your feet did not swell during these forty years.
5_8_4.NRSVCE: The clothes on your back did not wear out and your feet did not swell these forty years.

5_8_5.NKJV: You should know in your heart that as a man chastens his son, so the LORD your God chastens you.
5_8_5.KJV: Thou shalt also consider in thine heart, that, as a man chasteneth his son, so the LORD thy God chasteneth thee.
5_8_5.ESV: Know then in your heart that, as a man disciplines his son, the LORD your God disciplines you.
5_8_5.NASB: 'Thus you are to know in your heart that the LORD your God was disciplining you just as a man disciplines his son.
5_8_5.NLT: Think about it: Just as a parent disciplines a child, the LORD your God disciplines you for your own good.
5_8_5.WEB: You shall consider in your heart that as a man disciplines his son, so Yahweh your God disciplines you.
5_8_5.CSB17: Keep in mind that the LORD your God has been disciplining you just as a man disciplines his son.
5_8_5.AMP: Therefore, know in your heart (be fully cognizant) that the LORD your God disciplines and instructs you just as a man disciplines and instructs his son.
5_8_5.MSG: You learned deep in your heart that God disciplines you in the same ways a father disciplines his child.
5_8_5.NIV: Know then in your heart that as a man disciplines his son, so the Lord your God disciplines you.
5_8_5.NRSVCE: Know then in your heart that as a parent disciplines a child so the LORD your God disciplines you.

5_8_6.NKJV: “Therefore you shall keep the commandments of the LORD your God, to walk in His ways and to fear Him.
5_8_6.KJV: Therefore thou shalt keep the commandments of the LORD thy God, to walk in his ways, and to fear him.
5_8_6.ESV: So you shall keep the commandments of the LORD your God by walking in his ways and by fearing him.
5_8_6.NASB: 'Therefore, you shall keep the commandments of the LORD your God, to walk in His ways and to fear Him.
5_8_6.NLT: “So obey the commands of the LORD your God by walking in his ways and fearing him.
5_8_6.WEB: You shall keep the commandments of Yahweh your God, to walk in his ways, and to fear him.
5_8_6.CSB17: So keep the commands of the LORD your God by walking in his ways and fearing him.
5_8_6.AMP: Therefore, you shall keep the commandments of the LORD your God, to walk [that is, to live each and every day] in His ways and fear [and worship] Him [with awe-filled reverence and profound respect].
5_8_6.MSG: So it's paramount that you keep the commandments of God, your God, walk down the roads he shows you and reverently respect him.
5_8_6.NIV: Observe the commands of the Lord your God, walking in his ways and revering him.
5_8_6.NRSVCE: Therefore keep the commandments of the LORD your God, by walking in his ways and by fearing him.

5_8_7.NKJV: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, that flow out of valleys and hills;
5_8_7.KJV: For the LORD thy God bringeth thee into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and depths that spring out of valleys and hills;
5_8_7.ESV: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, flowing out in the valleys and hills,
5_8_7.NASB: 'For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, flowing forth in valleys and hills;
5_8_7.NLT: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land of flowing streams and pools of water, with fountains and springs that gush out in the valleys and hills.
5_8_7.WEB: For Yahweh your God brings you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of springs, and underground water flowing into valleys and hills;
5_8_7.CSB17: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land with streams, springs, and deep water sources, flowing in both valleys and hills;
5_8_7.AMP: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, flowing forth in valleys and hills;
5_8_7.MSG: God is about to bring you into a good land, a land with brooks and rivers, springs and lakes, streams out of the hills and through the valleys.
5_8_7.NIV: For the Lord your God is bringing you into a good land—a land with streams and pools of water, with springs flowing in the valleys and hills;
5_8_7.NRSVCE: For the LORD your God is bringing you into a good land, a land with flowing streams, with springs and underground waters welling up in valleys and hills,

5_8_8.NKJV: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive oil and honey;
5_8_8.KJV: A land of wheat, and barley, and vines, and fig trees, and pomegranates; a land of oil olive, and honey; of oil: Heb. of olive tree of oil
5_8_8.ESV: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive trees and honey,
5_8_8.NASB: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive oil and honey;
5_8_8.NLT: It is a land of wheat and barley; of grapevines, fig trees, and pomegranates; of olive oil and honey.
5_8_8.WEB: a land of wheat and barley, and vines and fig trees and pomegranates; a land of olive trees and honey;
5_8_8.CSB17: a land of wheat, barley, vines, figs, and pomegranates; a land of olive oil and honey;
5_8_8.AMP: a land of wheat and barley, and vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive oil and honey;
5_8_8.MSG: It's a land of wheat and barley, of vines and figs and pomegranates, of olives, oil, and honey.
5_8_8.NIV: a land with wheat and barley, vines and fig trees, pomegranates, olive oil and honey;
5_8_8.NRSVCE: a land of wheat and barley, of vines and fig trees and pomegranates, a land of olive trees and honey,

5_8_9.NKJV: a land in which you will eat bread without scarcity, in which you will lack nothing; a land whose stones are iron and out of whose hills you can dig copper.
5_8_9.KJV: A land wherein thou shalt eat bread without scarceness, thou shalt not lack any thing in it; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills thou mayest dig brass.
5_8_9.ESV: a land in which you will eat bread without scarcity, in which you will lack nothing, a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills you can dig copper.
5_8_9.NASB: a land where you will eat food without scarcity, in which you will not lack anything; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills you can dig copper.
5_8_9.NLT: It is a land where food is plentiful and nothing is lacking. It is a land where iron is as common as stone, and copper is abundant in the hills.
5_8_9.WEB: a land in which you shall eat bread without scarceness, you shall not lack anything in it; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills you may dig copper.
5_8_9.CSB17: a land where you will eat food without shortage, where you will lack nothing; a land whose rocks are iron and from whose hills you will mine copper.
5_8_9.AMP: a land where you will eat bread without shortage, in which you will lack nothing; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills you can dig copper.
5_8_9.MSG: It's land where you'll never go hungry—always food on the table and a roof over your head. It's a land where you'll get iron out of rocks and mine copper from the hills.
5_8_9.NIV: a land where bread will not be scarce and you will lack nothing; a land where the rocks are iron and you can dig copper out of the hills.
5_8_9.NRSVCE: a land where you may eat bread without scarcity, where you will lack nothing, a land whose stones are iron and from whose hills you may mine copper.

5_8_10.NKJV: When you have eaten and are full, then you shall bless the LORD your God for the good land which He has given you.
5_8_10.KJV: When thou hast eaten and art full, then thou shalt bless the LORD thy God for the good land which he hath given thee.
5_8_10.ESV: And you shall eat and be full, and you shall bless the LORD your God for the good land he has given you.
5_8_10.NASB: 'When you have eaten and are satisfied, you shall bless the LORD your God for the good land which He has given you.
5_8_10.NLT: When you have eaten your fill, be sure to praise the LORD your God for the good land he has given you.
5_8_10.WEB: You shall eat and be full, and you shall bless Yahweh your God for the good land which he has given you.
5_8_10.CSB17: When you eat and are full, you will bless the LORD your God for the good land he has given you.
5_8_10.AMP: When you have eaten and are satisfied, then you shall bless the LORD your God for the good land which He has given you.
5_8_10.MSG: After a meal, satisfied, bless God, your God, for the good land he has given you.
5_8_10.NIV: When you have eaten and are satisfied, praise the Lord your God for the good land he has given you.
5_8_10.NRSVCE: You shall eat your fill and bless the LORD your God for the good land that he has given you.

5_8_11.NKJV: “Beware that you do not forget the LORD your God by not keeping His commandments, His judgments, and His statutes which I command you today,
5_8_11.KJV: Beware that thou forget not the LORD thy God, in not keeping his commandments, and his judgments, and his statutes, which I command thee this day:
5_8_11.ESV: “Take care lest you forget the LORD your God by not keeping his commandments and his rules and his statutes, which I command you today,
5_8_11.NASB: 'Beware that you do not forget the LORD your God by not keeping His commandments and His ordinances and His statutes which I am commanding you today;
5_8_11.NLT: “But that is the time to be careful! Beware that in your plenty you do not forget the LORD your God and disobey his commands, regulations, and decrees that I am giving you today.
5_8_11.WEB: Beware lest you forget Yahweh your God, in not keeping his commandments, and his ordinances, and his statutes, which I command you today;
5_8_11.CSB17: “Be careful that you don’t forget the LORD your God by failing to keep his commands, ordinances, and statutes that I am giving you today.
5_8_11.AMP: "Beware that you do not forget the LORD your God by failing to keep His commandments and His judgments (precepts) and His statutes which I am commanding you today;
5_8_11.MSG: Make sure you don't forget God, your God, by not keeping his commandments, his rules and regulations that I command you today
5_8_11.NIV: Be careful that you do not forget the Lord your God, failing to observe his commands, his laws and his decrees that I am giving you this day.
5_8_11.NRSVCE: Take care that you do not forget the LORD your God, by failing to keep his commandments, his ordinances, and his statutes, which I am commanding you today.

5_8_12.NKJV: lest—when you have eaten and are full, and have built beautiful houses and dwell in them;
5_8_12.KJV: Lest when thou hast eaten and art full, and hast built goodly houses, and dwelt therein;
5_8_12.ESV: lest, when you have eaten and are full and have built good houses and live in them,
5_8_12.NASB: otherwise, when you have eaten and are satisfied, and have built good houses and lived [in them],
5_8_12.NLT: For when you have become full and prosperous and have built fine homes to live in,
5_8_12.WEB: lest, when you have eaten and are full, and have built fine houses, and lived in them;
5_8_12.CSB17: When you eat and are full, and build beautiful houses to live in,
5_8_12.AMP: otherwise, when you have eaten and are satisfied, and have built good houses and lived in them,
5_8_12.MSG: Make sure that when you eat and are satisfied, build pleasant houses and settle in,
5_8_12.NIV: Otherwise, when you eat and are satisfied, when you build fine houses and settle down,
5_8_12.NRSVCE: When you have eaten your fill and have built fine houses and live in them,

5_8_13.NKJV: and when your herds and your flocks multiply, and your silver and your gold are multiplied, and all that you have is multiplied;
5_8_13.KJV: And when thy herds and thy flocks multiply, and thy silver and thy gold is multiplied, and all that thou hast is multiplied;
5_8_13.ESV: and when your herds and flocks multiply and your silver and gold is multiplied and all that you have is multiplied,
5_8_13.NASB: and when your herds and your flocks multiply, and your silver and gold multiply, and all that you have multiplies,
5_8_13.NLT: and when your flocks and herds have become very large and your silver and gold have multiplied along with everything else, be careful!
5_8_13.WEB: and when your herds and your flocks multiply, and your silver and your gold is multiplied, and all that you have is multiplied;
5_8_13.CSB17: and your herds and flocks grow large, and your silver and gold multiply, and everything else you have increases,
5_8_13.AMP: and when your herds and flocks multiply, and your silver and gold multiply, and all that you have increases,
5_8_13.MSG: see your herds and flocks flourish and more and more money come in, watch your standard of living going up and up—
5_8_13.NIV: and when your herds and flocks grow large and your silver and gold increase and all you have is multiplied,
5_8_13.NRSVCE: and when your herds and flocks have multiplied, and your silver and gold is multiplied, and all that you have is multiplied,

5_8_14.NKJV: when your heart is lifted up, and you forget the LORD your God who brought you out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage;
5_8_14.KJV: Then thine heart be lifted up, and thou forget the LORD thy God, which brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage;
5_8_14.ESV: then your heart be lifted up, and you forget the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery,
5_8_14.NASB: then your heart will become proud and you will forget the LORD your God who brought you out from the land of Egypt, out of the house of slavery.
5_8_14.NLT: Do not become proud at that time and forget the LORD your God, who rescued you from slavery in the land of Egypt.
5_8_14.WEB: then your heart might be lifted up, and you forget Yahweh your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage;
5_8_14.CSB17: be careful that your heart doesn’t become proud and you forget the LORD your God who brought you out of the land of Egypt, out of the place of slavery.

5_8_15.NRSVCE: who led you through the great and terrible wilderness, an arid wasteland with poisonous snakes and scorpions. He made water flow for you from flint rock,

5_8_16.NKJV: who fed you in the wilderness with manna, which your fathers did not know, that He might humble you and that He might test you, to do you good in the end—

5_8_16.ESV: who fed you in the wilderness with manna that your fathers did not know, that he might humble you and test you, to do you good in the end.
5_8_16.NASB: 'In the wilderness He fed you manna which your fathers did not know, that He might humble you and that He might test you, to do good for you in the end.
5_8_16.NLT: He fed you with manna in the wilderness, a food unknown to your ancestors. He did this to humble you and test you for your own good.

5_8_16.CSB17: He fed you in the wilderness with manna, which your fathers had not known, in order to humble and test you, so that in the end he might cause you to prosper.

5_8_16.NRSVCE: and fed you in the wilderness with manna that your ancestors did not know, to humble you and to test you, and in the end to do you good.

5_8_17.NKJV: then you say in your heart, ‘My power and the might of my hand have gained me this wealth.’

5_8_17.NRSVCE: Do not say to yourself, “My power and the might of my own hand have gotten me this wealth.”

5_8_18.NKJV: “And you shall remember the LORD your God, for it is He who gives you power to get wealth, that He may establish His covenant which He swore to your fathers, as it is this day.
5_8_18.KJV: But thou shalt remember the LORD thy God: for it is he that giveth thee power to get wealth, that he may establish his covenant which he sware unto thy fathers, as it is this day.
5_8_18.ESV: You shall remember the LORD your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth, that he may confirm his covenant that he swore to your fathers, as it is this day.
5_8_18.NASB: 'But you shall remember the LORD your God, for it is He who is giving you power to make wealth, that He may confirm His covenant which He swore to your fathers, as [it is] this day.
5_8_18.NLT: Remember the LORD your God. He is the one who gives you power to be successful, in order to fulfill the covenant he confirmed to your ancestors with an oath.
5_8_18.WEB: But you shall remember Yahweh your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth; that he may establish his covenant which he swore to your fathers, as it is today.
5_8_18.CSB17: but remember that the LORD your God gives you the power to gain wealth, in order to confirm his covenant he swore to your fathers, as it is today.
5_8_18.AMP: But you shall remember [with profound respect] the LORD your God, for it is He who is giving you power to make wealth, that He may confirm His covenant which He swore (solemnly promised) to your fathers, as it is this day.
5_8_18.MSG: well, think again. Remember that God, your God, gave you the strength to produce all this wealth so as to confirm the covenant that he promised to your ancestors—as it is today.
5_8_18.NIV: But remember the Lord your God, for it is he who gives you the ability to produce wealth, and so confirms his covenant, which he swore to your forefathers, as it is today.
5_8_18.NRSVCE: But remember the LORD your God, for it is he who gives you power to get wealth, so that he may confirm his covenant that he swore to your ancestors, as he is doing today.

5_8_19.NKJV: Then it shall be, if you by any means forget the LORD your God, and follow other gods, and serve them and worship them, I testify against you this day that you shall surely perish.
5_8_19.KJV: And it shall be, if thou do at all forget the LORD thy God, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, I testify against you this day that ye shall surely perish.
5_8_19.ESV: And if you forget the LORD your God and go after other gods and serve them and worship them, I solemnly warn you today that you shall surely perish.
5_8_19.NASB: 'It shall come about if you ever forget the LORD your God and go after other gods and serve them and worship them, I testify against you today that you will surely perish.
5_8_19.NLT: “But I assure you of this: If you ever forget the LORD your God and follow other gods, worshiping and bowing down to them, you will certainly be destroyed.
5_8_19.WEB: It shall be, if you shall forget Yahweh your God, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, I testify against you today that you shall surely perish.
5_8_19.CSB17: If you ever forget the LORD your God and follow other gods to serve them and bow in worship to them, I testify against you today that you will perish.
5_8_19.AMP: And it shall come about if you ever forget the LORD your God and follow other gods and serve them and worship them, I testify against you today that you will most certainly perish.
5_8_19.MSG: If you forget, forget God, your God, and start taking up with other gods, serving and worshiping them, I'm on record right now as giving you firm warning: that will be the end of you; I mean it—destruction.
5_8_19.NIV: If you ever forget the Lord your God and follow other gods and worship and bow down to them, I testify against you today that you will surely be destroyed.
5_8_19.NRSVCE: If you do forget the LORD your God and follow other gods to serve and worship them, I solemnly warn you today that you shall surely perish.

5_8_20.NKJV: As the nations which the LORD destroys before you, so you shall perish, because you would not be obedient to the voice of the LORD your God.
5_8_20.KJV: As the nations which the LORD destroyeth before your face, so shall ye perish; because ye would not be obedient unto the voice of the LORD your God.
5_8_20.ESV: Like the nations that the LORD makes to perish before you, so shall you perish, because you would not obey the voice of the LORD your God.
5_8_20.NASB: 'Like the nations that the LORD makes to perish before you, so you shall perish; because you would not listen to the voice of the LORD your God.
5_8_20.NLT: Just as the LORD has destroyed other nations in your path, you also will be destroyed if you refuse to obey the LORD your God.
5_8_20.WEB: As the nations that Yahweh makes to perish before you, so you shall perish; because you wouldn’t listen to Yahweh your God’s voice.
5_8_20.CSB17: Like the nations the LORD is about to destroy before you, you will perish if you do not obey the LORD your God.
5_8_20.AMP: Like the nations which the LORD causes to perish before you, so shall you perish; because you would not listen to and obey the voice of the LORD your God.
5_8_20.MSG: You'll go to your doom—the same as the nations God is destroying before you; doom because you wouldn't obey the Voice of God, your God.
5_8_20.NIV: Like the nations the Lord destroyed before you, so you will be destroyed for not obeying the Lord your God.
5_8_20.NRSVCE: Like the nations that the LORD is destroying before you, so shall you perish, because you would not obey the voice of the LORD your God.

5_9_1.NIV: Not Because of Israel’s RighteousnessHear, O Israel. You are now about to cross the Jordan to go in and dispossess nations greater and stronger than you, with large cities that have walls up to the sky.
5_9_1.NRSVCE: Hear, O Israel! You are about to cross the Jordan today, to go in and dispossess nations larger and mightier than you, great cities, fortified to the heavens,
